text.name: Gauntlets of Ultramar
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Bolter">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Bolter Damage</style> to all enemies within 2 hexes. Scores an additional <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style> against surrounding enemies.
text.nextLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Bolter"> {[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Bolter Damage</style> to all enemies within 2 hexes. Scores an additional <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style> against surrounding enemies.

text.name: Rites of Battle
text.currentLevelDescription: Adjacent friendly units gain <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>. <style="Aliance_Imperial">Imperial</style> units gain <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg_2]} Damage</style> instead.
text.nextLevelDescription: Adjacent friendly units gain <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>. <style="Aliance_Imperial">Imperial</style> units gain <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg_2]} Damage</style> instead.

text.name: Psychic Fortress
text.currentLevelDescription: All friendly surrounding units have an added <style="Stat_Block">Block</style> with <style="Stat_Chance">{[blockChance]}% chance</style> to block <style="Stat_Damage">{[blockDmg]} Damage</style>. Also reduces incoming <style="DMG_Psychic">Psychic Damage</style> by {[dmgReduction]}.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now adds <style="Stat_Chance">{[blockChance]}% chance</style> to block <style="Stat_Damage">{[blockDmg]} Damage</style> and reduces incoming <style="DMG_Psychic">Psychic Damage</style> by {[dmgReduction]}.

text.name: Combat Restoratives
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Healing">Heals</style> himself and all adjacent friendly units for <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal]} Health</style>. <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal_2]} Health</style> if <style="Aliance_Imperial">Imperial</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now <style="Healing">heals</style> for <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal]} Health</style>. <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal_2]} Health</style> if <style="Aliance_Imperial">Imperial</style>.

text.name: Narthecium
text.currentLevelDescription: When an adjacent friendly non-<style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style> unit is defeated, it is immediately revived with a maximum of <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style>, unless <style="Overkill">Overkilled</style>. Can only be triggered once per turn.
text.nextLevelDescription: Units are now revived with <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style>.

text.name: Death From Above
text.currentLevelDescription: Summons 1 Inceptor for each round that has started. The Inceptors land adjacent to the target, whom they attack immediately. Note: if not enough hexes around the target are free, fewer Inceptors will be summoned. Inceptor stats: {[summonHp]} Health {[summonDmg]} Damage {[summonArmor]} Armour
text.nextLevelDescription:
Inceptor stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Shock Assault
text.currentLevelDescription: Whenever <style="Faction_Ultramarines">Bellator</style> attacks, any <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Ultramarines">Inceptor</style></style> adjacent to him also attacks eligible targets, dealing <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> for this attack.
text.nextLevelDescription: The <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Ultramarines">Inceptors</style></style> now deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> for this attack.

text.name: Mortis Round
text.currentLevelDescription:
Deals <style="Stat_Hits">1x</style> <style="DMG_Heavy">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Heavy Round Damage</style> to a single target within range 3, which is then <style="Displacement">pushed</style> back 1 hex.
The <style="Heavy_Weapon">Heavy Weapon</style> trait applies double to this ability.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">1x</style> <style="DMG_Heavy">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Heavy Round Damage</style>.

text.name: Camo Cloak
text.currentLevelDescription: Whenever an incoming <style="Stat_Range">ranged attack</style> has its number of hits reduced for any reason, it deals <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReduction]} Damage</style> per hit to this unit.
text.nextLevelDescription: <style="Stat_Range">Ranged attacks</style> now deal <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReduction]} Damage</style> per hit to this unit.

text.name: Adaptive Strategy
text.currentLevelDescription: Triggers <link="tooltip:Keywords/RelentlessMarch"><style="KEY">Relentless March</style></link> again for all adjacent <style="NonCharacter">Non-Character</style> friendly units and makes them immediately take an action, dealing <style="Stat_Damage">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Damage</style> per <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style> if they attack.
text.nextLevelDescription: Friendly units now deal <style="Stat_Damage">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Damage</style> per <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style>.

text.name: Relentless March
text.currentLevelDescription: Gives +1 <style="Stat_Movement">Movement</style> to all friendly units that start their turn in an adjacent hex. Also <style="Repairing">repairs</style> affected <style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style> units for <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToRepair]} Health</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now <style="Repairing">repairs</style> <style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style> units for <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToRepair]} Health</style>.

text.name: Multi-Threat Eliminator
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">6x</style> <style="DMG_Gauss">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Molecular Damage</style> to an enemy within range {[range]}. Any leftover <style="Stat_Hits">hits</style> are allocated to another enemy adjacent to the target and in range {[range]}. Each enemy killed adds <style="Stat_Hits">+{[extraHit]} hit</style> and the ability keeps targeting new enemies until there are no more enemies or <style="Stat_Hits">hits</style> left.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">6x</style> <style="DMG_Gauss">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Molecular Damage</style>.

text.name: Inescapable Death
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_Necrons">Imospekh</style> deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> while <style="Buff_Overwatching">Overwatching</style>. When Imospekh defeats a unit while <style="Buff_Overwatching">Overwatching</style>, they stay in <style="Overwatch">Overwatch</style>, retaining {[hitsReduction]} fewer <style="Stat_Hits">hits</style> compared to the previous attack.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> while <style="Buff_Overwatching">Overwatching</style>.

text.name: Scarab Hive
text.currentLevelDescription:
Summons 2 <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Necrons">Scarab Swarms</style></style> next to the target, whom they immediately attack using the Damage type <style="DMG_Piercing">Piercing</style>. In any subsequent attack they use their normal damage type.

Scarab Swarm’s stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>
text.nextLevelDescription:
Scarab Swarm’s stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Fabricator Claw Array
text.currentLevelDescription:
After moving, <style="Repairing">repairs</style> one random adjacent friendly <style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style> unit for <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToRepair]} Health</style>.
If <style="Faction_Necrons">Aleph-Null</style> does not move, then this ability triggers at the end of its turn.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now <style="Repairing">repairs</style> for <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToRepair]} Health</style>.

text.name: Harbinger of Destruction
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Direct">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Direct Damage</style> to up to <style="STAT">{[nrOfUnits]}</style> enemies within {[range]} hexes.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Direct">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Direct Damage</style> to up to <style="STAT">{[nrOfUnits]}</style> enemies.

text.name: Living Lightning
text.currentLevelDescription:
After moving, deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Direct">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Direct Damage</style> to a random enemy within range 2.
If <style="Faction_Necrons">Thutmose</style> does not move, then this ability triggers at the end of his turn.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Direct">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Direct Damage</style>.

text.name: Resurrection Orb
text.currentLevelDescription:
In a free adjacent hex, summons 1 <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Necrons">Necron Warrior</style></style> for each round that has started. Summons 1 more <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Necrons">Necron Warrior</style></style> for each friendly unit with the trait <style="Living_Metal">Living Metal</style> that was defeated in this battle.

Necron Warrior’s stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>
text.nextLevelDescription:
Necron Warrior’s stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Storm of Flensing Blades
text.currentLevelDescription: Attacks an adjacent enemy twice in a row, as long as the <style="Faction_Necrons">Flayed One</style> started the turn adjacent to it.

text.name: Reanimation Protocols
text.currentLevelDescription: If there is at least one other friendly unit of the same type on the battlefield when this unit is defeated, it has a <style="Stat_Chance">{[chance]}% chance</style> to be immediately revived with <style="Stat">{[hpPct]}%</style> of its initial Health in the same hex or a random adjacent one. Does not apply if <style="Overkill">Overkilled</style>.

text.name: Tunnelling Horror
text.currentLevelDescription: This unit may use tunnelling to move. It is then removed from the battlefield and emerges in its chosen hex at the start of its next turn, <style="Displacement">pushing</style> any unit in that hex aside. It is then able to immediately attack any adjacent enemy in <style="Stat_Melee">melee</style>.

text.name: Whipcoil Body
text.currentLevelDescription: This unit takes <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReduction]} Damage</style> from melee attacks.

text.name: Armorium Cherub
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals {[nrOfHits]}x {[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Flame Damage to a target within range {[range]}. Using Armorium Cherub does not end Vindicta's turn.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Flame">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Flame Damage</style>.

text.name: Fire of Absolution
text.currentLevelDescription: When performing a ranged attack, also deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Flame">{[dmg]} Flame Damage</style> to all units adjacent to the target. Has a <style="Stat_Chance">{[chance]}% chance</style> of setting each adjacent hex on <style="Effect_Fire">Fire</style> as well.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Flame">{[dmg]} Flame Damage</style>.

text.name: Precision Shot
text.currentLevelDescription: The Deathmark neither moves nor attacks for a turn, but instead takes aim. On its next turn, it is not allowed to move, but is able to fire its Synaptic Disintegrator with incredible accuracy, dealing <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Energy">{[dmg]} Energy Damage</style>.

text.name: Scarab Summon
text.currentLevelDescription: Summons another <style="Faction_Necrons">Scarab Swarm</style> in a free adjacent hex, which then immediately takes a turn.

text.name: Storm Of Wrath
text.currentLevelDescription:
Deals <style="Stat_Hits">1x</style> <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage</style> to a unit within 2 hexes and up to {[maxAdjacentTargets]} adjacent units.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}
text.nextLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">1x</style> <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage</style> to a unit within 2 hexes and up to {[maxAdjacentTargets]} adjacent units.

text.name: Martial Apotheosis
text.currentLevelDescription: At the start of its turn, Anuphet deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Energy">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Energy Damage</style> to a random adjacent enemy.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Energy">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Energy Damage</style>.

text.name: Chronometron
text.currentLevelDescription: All enemy units within range {[range]} are <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppressed</style> for {[nrOfRounds]} round. Affected <style="Summon">Summons</style> are <style="Debuff_Stunned">Stunned</style> instead. All affected enemies take <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> from the next attack made by a unit against them, or <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg_2]} Damage</style> if the attacker is <style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected enemies now take <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> from the next attack made by a unit against them, or <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg_2]} Damage</style> if the attacker is <style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style>.

text.name: Timesplinter Mantle
text.currentLevelDescription: At the start of each turn, Thothmek and all friendly adjacent Mechanical units gain Timesplinter Mantle. Affected units take -{[dmgReduction]} Damage from the first attack made by a unit against them. After being attacked or at the end of the turn, the effect ends.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected units now take <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReduction]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Reanimation Beam
text.currentLevelDescription: All friendly units that are affected by Nanoscarab Repair Protocols are repaired for {[hpToRepair]} Health. Affected Summons immediately take an action, using {[dmgPct]}% of their own Damage stat to a maximum of {[maxDmg]} Damage when attacking. Until the start of the Reanimator's next turn, the first time a friendly unit affected by Nanoscarab Repair Protocols would be defeated, it is instead revived with a maximum of {[hp]} Health, unless Overkilled. Initial cooldown: {[initialCooldownTurns]} round. Cost: {[munitionsCost]} munition.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected units are now <style="Repairing">repaired</style> for <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToRepair]} Health</style>. Affected <style="Summon">Summons</style> now use <style="Stat">{[dmgPct]}%</style> of their own <style="Stat_Damage">Damage stat</style> to a maximum of <style="Stat_Damage">{[maxDmg]} Damage</style> and units are now revived with <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style>.

text.name: Nanoscarab Repair Protocols
text.currentLevelDescription: Targets a friendly mechanical unit that is not affected by Nanoscarab Repair Protocols. It is now affected by Nanoscarab Repair Protocols for the rest of the battle. The target immediately gains {[hp]} Health and its maximum Health increases by the same amount. When the affected unit regains Health, the amount it regains is increased by {[hpToRepair]} Health.
text.nextLevelDescription: The target now gains <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style> and maximum <style="Stat_Health">Health</style>, and regains <style="Stat_Health">+{[hpToRepair]} Health</style> whenever it regains <style="Stat_Health">Health</style>.

text.name: Guardian Construct
text.currentLevelDescription: Friendly Mythic characters that are affected by Nanoscarab Repair Protocols deal +{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected units now deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style>.

text.name: Rites of Restoration
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Healing">Heals</style> herself and all adjacent friendly units for <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal]} Health</style>. Resurrects {[nrOfHeroes]} random friendly <style="Aliance_Imperial">Imperial</style> <style="Character">Character</style> and up to <style="Stat">{[nrOfSummons]}</style> random friendly <style="Aliance_Imperial">Imperial</style> <style="Summon">Summons</style> that have been defeated in this battle. Resurrected units appear in free adjacent hexes with <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style> and are unable to act on this turn. Only affects non-<style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style> units.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now <style="Healing">heals</style> herself and all adjacent friendly units for <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal]} Health</style>. Resurrected units now return with <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style>.

text.name: Sanctorum Missile
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> to a target within range {[range]} and <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> to all hexes adjacent to the target – with the exception of Morvenn Vahl's own hex, were she adjacent to the target.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> to the target and <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> to the adjacent hexes.

text.name: Brazier of Holy Fire
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Flame">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Flame Damage</style> to a target enemy within range {[range]} and sets its hex on <style="Effect_Fire">Fire</style>. Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Flame">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Flame Damage</style> vs <style="Daemon">Daemons</style> instead. ALL <style="Daemon">Daemons</style> within {[range_2]} hexes of the target take <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Extra Damage</style> this round and the next. <style="Immune">Immune</style> <style="Daemon">Daemons</style> only take <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct_2]}% Extra Damage</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Flame">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Flame Damage</style> to a target enemy within range {[range]} and sets its hex on <style="Effect_Fire">Fire</style>. Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Flame">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Flame Damage</style> vs <style="Daemon">Daemons</style> instead. ALL <style="Daemon">Daemons</style> within {[range_2]} hexes of the target take <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Extra Damage</style> this round and the next. <style="Immune">Immune</style> <style="Daemon">Daemons</style> only take <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct_2]}% Extra Damage</style>.

text.name: Sky Strike
text.currentLevelDescription:
If <style="Faction_Sisterhood">Celestine</style> has not moved, she targets an enemy unit on the battlefield that has a free adjacent hex, then moves adjacent to it and attacks it. The attack deals the same damage as her <style="NormalAttack">normal attack</style> plus an additional  <style="DMG_Power">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>.

<style="Cooldown">Initial cooldown: {[initialCooldownTurns]} round</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals an additional <style="DMG_Power">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Psychic Maelstrom
text.currentLevelDescription:
Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage</style> to a target within {[range]} hexes. <style="Stat_Chance">{[chance]}% chance</style> to score another <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style>.

If it does, <style="Stat_Chance">{[chance_2]}% chance</style> to score another <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style>. 
If it does, <style="Stat_Chance">{[chance_3]}% chance</style> to score another <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style>. 
If it does, <style="Stat_Chance">{[chance_4]}% chance</style> to score another <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style>.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage</style> per <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style>.

text.name: Send In The Next Wave
text.currentLevelDescription:
Select a target within 2 hexes. Summon <style="Stat">{[nrOfSummons]}</style> <style="Summon"><style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Cadian Guardsmen</style></style> plus one for each defeated friendly unit, who immediately appear and fire upon a target from random free hexes within range 2 of the target. The maximum number of <style="Summon"><style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Cadian Guardsmen</style></style> this can summon is <style="Stat">{[maxSummons]}</style>. 

Cadian Guardsman’s stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>
text.nextLevelDescription:
The maximum number of <style="Summon"><style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Cadian Guardsmen</style></style> this can summon is <style="Stat">{[maxSummons]}</style>. 

Cadian Guardsman’s stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Frag Bomb
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> to an adjacent target and <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> to ALL units adjacent to the target hex, except <style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Kut Skoden</style> himself.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> to an adjacent target and <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> to ALL units adjacent to the target hex, except <style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Kut Skoden</style> himself.

text.name: Basilisk Barrage
text.currentLevelDescription:
If <style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Thaddeus Noble</style> has not moved, unleashes a barrage of {[nrOfProjectiles]} shells on any target on the battlefield, each dealing <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style>. {[nrOfProjectiles_2]} randomly hit the target hex or surrounding hexes and the remaining 2 hit the hexes surrounding those. For each round that has ended, 1 more of the shells hits the target hex, starting with the shells hitting the outer hexes. The <style="Suppressive_Fire">Suppressive Fire</style> trait applies also to this ability.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style>.

text.name: Supreme Commander
text.currentLevelDescription:
Summons up to <style="Stat">{[nrOfSummons]}</style><style="Summon"><style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Cadian Guardsman</style></style> in free adjacent hexes. All friendly <style="Summon"><style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Cadian Guardsmen</style></style> within {[range]} hexes then immediately take a turn. If <style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Colour Sergeant Kell</style> is in play, summons an additional <style="Summon"><style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Cadian Guardsman</style></style> and activation range is 3.

Cadian Guardsman’s stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>
text.nextLevelDescription:
Cadian Guardsman’s stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Valkyrie Strike
text.currentLevelDescription:
Calls in an air strike on a target hex anywhere on the battlefield, which gets marked with red smoke. After one round, the target hex and two random surrounding hexes are hit with Hellstrike Missiles, each dealing <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style>.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}

text.name: Bringer of Despair
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style> to a melee target and <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style> to another random enemy adjacent to <style="Faction_BlackLegion">Angrax</style>. Any resulting <style="Battle_Fatigue">Battle Fatigue</style> is triggered twice.
text.nextLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style> to a melee target and <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style> to another random enemy adjacent to <style="Faction_BlackLegion">Angrax</style>. text.name: Crusade Of Wrath
text.currentLevelDescription: All other friendly units within {[range]} hexes gain <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> and <style="Piercing_Ratio">+{[extraPierceRatio]}% pierce ratio</style> in melee – regardless of Damage type – for this round and the next. <style="Faction_BlackTemplars">High Marshal Helbrecht</style> immediately performs a <style="NormalAttack">normal melee attack</style> against a random adjacent enemy.
text.nextLevelDescription: Units now gain <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> and <style="Piercing_Ratio">+{[extraPierceRatio]}% pierce ratio</style>.

text.name: Holy Duel
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_BlackTemplars">Brother Jaeger</style> <style="Debuff_Taunted">Taunts</style> an adjacent enemy unit and immediately performs a <style="NormalAttack">normal attack</style> against it. <style="Faction_BlackTemplars">Brother Jaeger</style> deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> and takes <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReduction]} Damage</style> from the target while it’s <style="Debuff_Taunted">Taunted</style> by him. <style="Faction_BlackTemplars">Brother Jaeger</style> is also <style="Debuff_Taunted">Taunted</style> by the target and the taunt does not expire with rounds passed.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> and takes <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReduction]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Unbreakable Duty
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_BlackTemplars">Ancient Thoread</style> and all friendly units within {[range]} hexes receive <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style> until the start of their next turn. If 2 or more friendly <style="Aliance_Imperial">Imperial</style> <style="Character">Characters</style> are dead upon activation of this ability, <style="Faction_BlackTemplars">Ancient Thoread</style> gains <style="Stat_Health">{[extraHp]} extra Health</style> and <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> until the end of the battle and immediately performs a <style="NormalAttack">normal attack</style> against an adjacent enemy.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now receives <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style>, gains <style="Stat_Health">{[extraHp]} extra Health</style> and deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Thunderous Assault
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style> to an adjacent enemy and <style="Displacement">pushes</style> it one hex backwards. The target is <style="Debuff_Stunned">Stunned</style> for 1 round. <style="Faction_BlackTemplars">Sword Brother Godswyl</style> then moves into the vacated hex if able. Enemies defeated by this attack are <style="Obliterated">always overkilled</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style>.

text.name: Fragstorm Grenade Launcher
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals up to <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> to a target within {[range]} hexes. Any leftover <style="Stat_Hits">hits</style> are allocated to enemy units within {[range]} hexes, prioritising kills.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals up to <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style>.

text.name: Incendiary Shells
text.currentLevelDescription: Fires the Astartes shotgun at an enemy within {[range]} hexes, dealing <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Flame">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Flame Damage</style>.

text.name: Destroy The Witch
text.currentLevelDescription: Gains <style="Stat_Movement">+{[extraMovement]} Movement</style> when there’s an enemy <style="Psyker">Psyker</style> on the battlefield. This unit and friendly adjacent units deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> with melee attacks against <style="Psyker">Psykers</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: They now deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Martial Superiority
text.currentLevelDescription: If <style="Faction_BlackTemplars">Brother Jaeger</style> gets targeted with a melee attack from an adjacent enemy during the enemy’s turn, he deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style> to the attacker before the enemy attack executes.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style>.

text.name: Astartes Banner
text.currentLevelDescription: Other friendly units within {[range]} hexes score an additional <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style> with their melee attacks. This additional <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style> can deal a maximum of <style="Stat_Damage">{[maxDmg]} Damage</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: The additional hit can now deal a maximum of <style="Stat_Damage">{[maxDmg]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Champion Of The Feast
text.currentLevelDescription: After moving, deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style> to an adjacent enemy and reduces this enemy's Armour by <style="Stat_Armor">{[armorReduction]} Armour</style> for the rest of the battle. If <style="Faction_BlackTemplars">Sword Brother Godswyl</style> does not move, then this ability triggers at the end of his turn.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style> and reduces this enemy's Armour by <style="Stat_Armor">{[armorReduction]} Armour</style>.

text.name: Boltstorm
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="NormalAttack">Normal ranged attacks</style> deal an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Bolter">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Bolter Damage</style> to the target and to each enemy adjacent to the target that is also within range of <style="Faction_BlackTemplars">Brother Burchard</style>. Enemies hit are <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppressed</style> for 1 round.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Bolter">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Bolter Damage</style>.

text.name: Heavy Bolt Pistol
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Bolter">{[dmg]} Bolter Damage</style> in melee.

text.name: Waaagh!
text.currentLevelDescription:
If <style="Faction_Orks">Boss Gulgortz</style> has not moved, he summons <style="STAT">{[nrOfSummons]}</style> <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Orks">Ork Boyz</style></style> in free adjacent hexes. Until the end of this turn, all friendly <style="Faction_Orks">Orks</style> and friendly units adjacent to <style="Faction_Orks">Boss Gulgortz</style> gain <style="Stat_Movement">+{[extraMovement]} Movement</style> and their <style="NormalAttack">normal melee attacks</style> deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> and score an additional <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style>. <style="Faction_Orks">Boss Gulgortz</style> then <style="Charging">charges</style> a targeted enemy in movement range, performing a <style="NormalAttack">normal melee attack</style> against it. All friendly <style="Faction_Orks">Ork Boyz</style> take a turn.

Ork Boyz' stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>
text.nextLevelDescription:
Units now deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>. 

Ork Boyz' stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Grot Tank
text.currentLevelDescription:
Calls in a <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Orks">Grot Tank</style></style> in an adjacent free hex. The <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Orks">Grot Tank</style></style> cannot move in its first turn, but can immediately attack an enemy in range.

Grot Tank’s stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style> +<style="Stat_Health">{[extraHp]}</style> for each round that has started
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>
text.nextLevelDescription:
Grot Tank’s stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style> +<style="Stat_Health">{[extraHp]}</style> for each round that has started
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Dakka! Dakka! Dakka!
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Projectile">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Projectile Damage</style> to an enemy within range {[range]}. Adds <style="Stat_Hits">+{[extraHits]}</style> hits for each time <style="Faction_Orks">Snappawrecka</style> was <style="Repairing">repaired</style> this battle, but cannot exceed <style="Stat_Hits">{[maxNrOfHits]} hits</style> in total. If the target is defeated, leftover hits are allocated to random enemies within {[range_2]} hexes. <style="Faction_Orks">Snappawrecka</style> also loses <style="Stat">{[healthPct]}%</style> of his maximum <style="Stat_Health">Health</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Projectile">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Projectile Damage</style>.

text.name: Get ’Em Runtz
text.currentLevelDescription:
Summons 1 <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Orks">Grot</style></style> in each adjacent hex that also has an enemy unit adjacent to it. Newly spawned <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Orks">Grots</style></style> can immediately attack an enemy in <style="Stat_Melee">melee</style>, but cannot move this turn. Enemy units attacked by a <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Orks">Grot</style></style> this way are <style="Debuff_Taunted">Taunted</style> for 1 round.

Grot’s stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
text.nextLevelDescription:
Grot’s stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>

text.name: Unstoppable Momentum
text.currentLevelDescription:
Charges in one of 6 directions and keeps moving in a straight line until he hits an obstacle or a <style="Big_Target">Big Target</style>. Any enemies hit by the charge take <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Direct">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Direct Damage</style>, increased by <style="Stat_Damage">{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> for each hex traversed from the starting hex to the enemy. Affected enemies get <style="Displacement">pushed</style> and <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppressed</style> for 1 round. A <style="Big_Target">Big Target</style> is <style="Debuff_Stunned">Stunned</style> for 1 round instead. Friendly units are also displaced, but take no damage or negative effects.

Initial <style="Cooldown">cooldown: {[initialCooldownTurns]} round</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Enemies now take <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Direct">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Direct Damage</style>, increased by <style="Stat_Damage">{[extraDmg]}</style> for each hex traversed from the starting hex to the enemy.

text.name: Stikkbomb
text.currentLevelDescription: Throws a grenade at a target, dealing <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> to the target and <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> to units in hexes adjacent to the target. Range {[range]} and <style="Indirect_Fire">Indirect Fire</style> applies.

text.name: Stormboyz Strike
text.currentLevelDescription: In its first turn this unit flies into any free hex, instead of starting on its designated spawn point. There's a {[chance]}% chance it misses its designated hex and ends up in a random adjacent hex instead. This fly-in counts as a movement for Full Throttle.

text.name: Light ’im up!
text.currentLevelDescription: After performing a <style="NormalAttack">normal attack</style>, <style="Faction_Orks">Boss Gulgortz</style> performs a second attack against the same enemy, dealing <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Projectile">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Projectile Damage</style>. If the target is defeated, leftover hits are allocated to any random enemy target within {[range]} hexes.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Projectile">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Projectile Damage</style>.

text.name: Kustom Force Field
text.currentLevelDescription: All friendly adjacent units have <style="Stat_Armor">+{[extraArmor]} Armour</style>. <style="Faction_Orks">Gibbascrapz</style> and other friendly adjacent <style="Faction_Orks">Orks</style> have <style="Stat_Armor">+{[extraArmor_2]} Armour</style> instead and ignore <style="Battle_Fatigue">Battle Fatigue</style>, if they have it.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected units now have <style="Stat_Armor">+{[extraArmor]} Armour</style> and <style="Faction_Orks">Orks</style> have <style="Stat_Armor">+{[extraArmor_2]} Armour</style>.

text.name: Power Trip
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="NormalAttack">Normal attacks</style> ignore <style="Stat_Armor">{[armorIgnored]} Armour</style>. If <style="Faction_Orks">Snappawrecka</style> is at full <style="Stat_Health">Health</style>, his <style="NormalAttack">normal attacks</style> additionally score <style="Stat_Hits">+{[extraHit]} hit</style> and reduce the target's Armour by <style="Stat_Armor">{[armorReduction]} Armour</style>, but also cause <style="Faction_Orks">Snappawrecka</style> to lose <style="Stat">{[hpPct]}%</style> of his maximum <style="Stat_Health">Health</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: <style="NormalAttack">Normal attacks</style> now ignore <style="Stat_Armor">{[armorIgnored]} Armour</style> and potentially reduce the target's Armour by <style="Stat_Armor">{[armorReduction]} Armour</style>.

text.name: Squig Hound
text.currentLevelDescription:
Friendly <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Orks">Grots</style></style> ignore <style="Battle_Fatigue">Battle Fatigue</style>. <style="Faction_Orks">Snotflogga</style>'s <style="NormalAttack">normal attacks</style> deal an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Physical">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Physical Damage</style>. After attacking, if there are less than <style="Stat">{[maxSummons]}</style> friendly <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Orks">Grots</style></style> on the battlefield, they summon a <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Orks">Grot</style></style> adjacent to the target that immediately can attack.

Grot’s stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
text.nextLevelDescription:
Now deals an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Physical">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Physical Damage</style>.

Grot’s stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>

text.name: Smasha 'Ead
text.currentLevelDescription: When he traverses 2 or more hexes during his turn, then <style="Faction_Orks">Tanksmasha</style> gains <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> for <style="NormalAttack">normal attacks</style> and takes <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style> until the start of his next turn.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now gains <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> for <style="NormalAttack">normal attacks</style> and takes <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style>

text.name: Pile In
text.currentLevelDescription:
If this unit has full <style="Stat_Health">Health</style> at the end of its turn, it has a {[chance]}% chance to <style="Summon">summon</style> another <style="Faction_Orks">Grot</style> in an adjacent free hex, -{[chance_2]}% for each friendly <style="Faction_Orks">Grot</style> currently on the board. The spawned <style="Faction_Orks">Grot</style> acts as normal on its next turn.

Grot’s stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>

text.name: It’s Gonna Blow
text.currentLevelDescription:
If this unit is <style="Overkill">Overkilled</style> the ammo box explodes, dealing <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> to all adjacent hexes.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}

text.name: Oi Watch It
text.currentLevelDescription: When this unit is attacked, a <style="Steppable">steppable</style> crate of <style="Resource_Gold">Coins</style> is spawned in a free adjacent hex for each hit taken.

text.name: Ramshackle
text.currentLevelDescription: Takes <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReduction]} damage</style> from attacks with damage types that have <style="Piercing_Ratio">{[pierceRatio]}% pierce ratio</style> or lower.

text.name: Full Throttle
text.currentLevelDescription: Whenever this unit moves <style="Stat_Movement">{[movement]}</style> or more hexes, there’s a {[chance]}% chance its rokkit malfunctions and causes the <style="Faction_Orks">Storm Boy</style> to go up in flames. In this event the unit is not revivable.

text.name: Volatile
text.currentLevelDescription:
If this unit is <style="Overkill">Overkilled</style> it deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Bolter">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Bolter Damage</style> to all adjacent tiles.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}

text.name: Explosive
text.currentLevelDescription:
Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> to all adjacent hexes when destroyed.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}

text.name: Devout Push
text.currentLevelDescription: Executes a <style="NormalAttack">normal melee attack</style> on a single target, then gets to move 1 additional hex.

text.name: Pyreblaster
text.currentLevelDescription: When performing a ranged attack, sets the hex behind the enemy on <style="Effect_Fire">Fire</style> and deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Flame">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Flame Damage</style> to any enemy on that hex.

text.name: Call Ripper Swarms
text.currentLevelDescription:
Summons <style="Stat">{[nrOfSummons]}</style> burrowing <style="Summon">Ripper Swarms</style>, who emerge from the ground at the beginning of the Hive Tyrant's next turn, unless their hex is occupied by another unit

Ripper Swarms' stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

Summons <style="Stat">{[nrOfSummons]}</style> burrowing <style="Summon">Ripper Swarms</style>, who emerge from the ground at the beginning of the Hive Tyrant's next turn, unless their hex is occupied by another unit

text.name: Stranglethorn Cannon
text.currentLevelDescription: The Hive Tyrant attacks using its Stranglethorn Cannon, dealing <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> to an initial target within {[range]} hexes. Any units adjacent to the target suffer <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} Blast Damage</style>.

text.name: Prehensile Pincer Tail
text.currentLevelDescription: When the Hive Tyrant attacks an enemy in melee, that target or an enemy unit adjacent to both the target and the Hive Tyrant takes <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Physical">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Physical Damage</style>.

text.name: Soul Hunger
text.currentLevelDescription:
Enemy Psykers take <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage</style> when using Active abilities or Smite within {[range]} hexes from the Hive Tyrant.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}

text.name: Adaptive Toxins
text.currentLevelDescription: Each unit hit by the Hive Tyrant in melee suffers a <style="Stat_Armor">-{[armorReduction]} Armour</style> reduction for the rest of the battle.

text.name: Draw Fire
text.currentLevelDescription: Any friendly adjacent units hit by enemy attacks have half of the <style="Stat_Hits">hits</style> (rounded down) hit the Terminator instead.

text.name: Crazed Focus
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> to enemies on hexes with a <style="HexEffect">hex effect</style>.

text.name: Fire And Reposition
text.currentLevelDescription: May move as normal and attack. After attacking, she may make one more normal movement. In the following enemy turn, she takes <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReduction]} Damage</style> from ranged attacks. Can only be used if <style="Faction_Aeldari">Calandis</style> has a target in range.
text.nextLevelDescription: She now takes <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReduction]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Wireweave Net
text.currentLevelDescription: The first time <style="Faction_Aeldari">Calandis</style> is targeted by a <style="NormalAttack">normal melee attack</style> during the enemy's turn, the attacker immediately takes <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Piercing">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Piercing Damage</style>. If the attacker is eliminated, their melee attack is not executed.
text.nextLevelDescription: The attacker now takes <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Piercing">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Piercing Damage</style>.

text.name: Swooping Hawk
text.currentLevelDescription:
Flies over and deals a wave of damage from an initial melee target to targets up to 2 hexes behind. <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Piercing">{[dmg[0]]} Piercing Damage</style> to first target, <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Piercing">{[dmg[1]]} Piercing Damage</style> to the second, and <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Piercing">{[dmg[2]]} Piercing Damage</style> to the third. Lands in the hex directly behind the last target hit, or - in case that hex is occupied - to the closest free hex to it.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}
text.nextLevelDescription: <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Piercing">{[dmg[0]]} Piercing Damage</style> to first target, <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Piercing">{[dmg[1]]} Piercing Damage</style> to the second, and <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Piercing">{[dmg[2]]} Piercing Damage</style> to the third.

text.name: Path Of Command
text.currentLevelDescription: Other friendly units within {[range]} hexes gain <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>. Their <style="Stat_CritDamage">Crit <style="Stat_Chance">chance</style></style> – if they have one – is increased by <style="Stat">+{[extraCritChance]}%</style>. Affected <style="Faction_Aeldari">Aeldari</style> units gain an additional <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg_2]} Damage</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Other friendly units within {[range]} hexes gain <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>. Their <style="Stat_CritDamage">Crit <style="Stat_Chance">chance</style></style> – if they have one – is increased by <style="Stat">+{[extraCritChance]}%</style>. Affected <style="Faction_Aeldari">Aeldari</style> units gain an additional <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg_2]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Executioner
text.currentLevelDescription: An enemy target within range {[range]} takes <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage</style> for each round that has started. If the target is eliminated, then an adjacent enemy unit also takes <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage</style> for each round that has started.
text.nextLevelDescription: An enemy target within range {[range]} takes <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage</style> for each round that has started. If the target is eliminated, then an adjacent enemy unit also takes <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage</style> for each round that has started.

text.name: Doom
text.currentLevelDescription: All enemy units exactly {[range]} hexes away from <style="Faction_Aeldari">Eldryon</style> take <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> from other friendly unit's <style="NormalAttack">normal attacks</style>. Other friendly <style="Faction_Aeldari">Aeldari</style> units deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg_2]} Damage</style> with all their attacks to affected units instead.
text.nextLevelDescription: All enemy units exactly {[range]} hexes away from <style="Faction_Aeldari">Eldryon</style> take <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> from other friendly unit's <style="NormalAttack">normal attacks</style>. Other friendly <style="Faction_Aeldari">Aeldari</style> units deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg_2]} Damage</style> with all their attacks to affected units instead.

text.name: Harvester Of Souls
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Heavy">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Heavy Round Damage</style> to a target within range {[range]} and to all enemies adjacent to the target that are also within range {[range]} of <style="Faction_Aeldari">Maugan Ra</style>. These attacks score an additional <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style> if Maugan Ra has not moved this turn.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Heavy">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Heavy Round Damage</style>.

text.name: Inescapable Accuracy
text.currentLevelDescription: If Maugan Ra has not moved, then his ranged attacks ignore hit reductions, have +{[extraCritChance]}% Crit Chance, and deal an additional {[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage. Inescapable Accuracy applies to targets of Harvester of Souls as well as attacks triggered by Overwatch.
text.nextLevelDescription: If Maugan Ra has not moved, then his ranged attacks ignore hit reductions, have +{[extraCritChance]}% Crit Chance, and deal an additional {[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage. Inescapable Accuracy applies to targets of Harvester of Souls as well as attacks triggered by Overwatch.

text.name: Silent Death
text.currentLevelDescription: Jain Zar throws the Silent Death at an adjacent enemy, dealing {[nrOfHits]}x {[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Piercing Damage to it and up to {[nrOfTargets]} additional enemies adjacent to each other, before returning to Jain Zar’s hands.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Piercing">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Piercing Damage</style>.

text.name: Terror's Lament
text.currentLevelDescription: Adjacent enemy units deal <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReduction]} Damage</style> and have <style="Stat_Hits">-{[hitsReduction]}</style> hits with melee attacks, to a minimum of 1.
text.nextLevelDescription: Adjacent enemy units now deal <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReduction]} Damage</style> and have <style="Stat_Hits">-{[hitsReduction]}</style> hits with melee attacks, to a minimum of 1.

text.name: Scything Talons
text.currentLevelDescription:
Attacks an enemy in melee for <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Bio">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Bio Damage</style> and any enemy units adjacent to that target and to the <style="Faction_Tyranids">Tyranid Warrior</style> take <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Bio">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Bio Damage</style>. 

Double hits against <style="Summon">Summons</style>.

text.name: Reinforced Hive Node
text.currentLevelDescription: Every second round – starting from the first the <style="Faction_Tyranids">Tyranid Warrior</style> is in play – the <style="Faction_Tyranids">Tyranid Warrior</style> has <style="Stat_Armor">+100% Armour</style> and – if it has <style="Stat_Block">Block</style> – 100% <style="Stat_Block">Block <style="Stat_Chance">chance</style></style>.

text.name: Breath of Silence
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_Necrons">Szarekh</style> summons {[nrOfSummons]} <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Necrons">Deathmarks</style></style> on free hexes within range {[range]} from his throne starting hex.

text.name: Annihilator Beam
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_Necrons">Szarekh</style> triggers his <style="Faction_Necrons">Triarchal Menhirs</style> to fire on {[nrOfTargets]} hexes. These hexes light up with light pillars and at the start of <style="Faction_Necrons">Szarekh</style>'s next turn any unit in those hexes is dealt <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Piercing">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Piercing Damage</style>.

text.name: My Will Be Done
text.currentLevelDescription: Immediately trigger one attack by each friendly <style="Faction_Necrons">Necron</style> unit on the battlefield from their current hex and as long as they have a target in range.

text.name: Scythe of Dust
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_Necrons">Mesophet</style> does a mighty sweep with his scythe, dealing <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Energy">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Energy Damage</style> to all enemies in adjacent hexes.

text.name: Staff of Stars
text.currentLevelDescription: Hapthatra unleashes the full power of the Staff of Stars, dealing {[nrOfHits]}x {[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Energy Damage to an initial target and {[nrOfHits]}x {[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} Energy Damage to all enemies adjacent to that target. Summons take double Damage.

text.name: Targeting Protocols
text.currentLevelDescription: Sets up to fire on {[nrOfTargets]} hexes. These hexes light up with light pillars and at the start of the <style="Faction_Necrons">Menhir</style>'s next turn any unit in those hexes is hit by an Annihilator Beam and is dealt <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Piercing">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Piercing Damage</style>.

text.name: Obeisance Generators
text.currentLevelDescription:
Enemy units <style="Charging">charging</style> <style="Faction_Necrons">Szarekh</style> score <style="Stat_Hits">-{[hitsReduction]}</style> hits, to a minimum of 1 hit.
<style="Summon">Summons</style> <style="Charging">charging</style> <style="Faction_Necrons">Szarekh</style> score <style="Stat_Hits">-{[hitsReduction_2]}</style> hits, to a minimum of 1 hit.

text.name: Noctilith Beacons
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_Necrons">Szarekh</style> and all <style="Faction_Necrons">Necrons</style> adjacent to him take <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgPctReduction]}% Damage</style> from all enemies with the <style="Psyker">Psyker</style> trait.

text.name: Phaeron of the Blades
text.currentLevelDescription: All adjacent <style="Faction_Necrons">Necrons</style> deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> with melee attacks.

text.name: Phaeron of the Stars
text.currentLevelDescription: All adjacent <style="Faction_Necrons">Necrons</style> deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> with ranged attacks.

text.name: Integrated Circuits
text.currentLevelDescription: Any time a friendly unit is <style="Overkill">Overkilled</style>, the <style="Faction_Necrons">Menhir</style> also takes that same amount of Damage as <style="DMG_Direct">Direct Damage</style>.

text.name: Seeker Missile Frequency Lock
text.nextLevelDescription: The Seeker Missile now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Heavy">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Heavy Round Damage</style>.

text.name: MV71 Sniper Drone Squad
text.currentLevelDescription:
Instead of a ranged attack, <style="Faction_Tau">Sho'syl</style> summons a <style="Summon">MV71 Sniper Drone</style> and commands it to attack the target. This attack uses <style="Faction_Tau">Sho'syl's</style> <style="Stat_Damage">Damage stat</style>, while other effects, like buffs, are taken from the Drone. If <style="Faction_Tau">Sho'syl</style> already controls {[maxSummons]} <style="Summon">MV71 Sniper Drones</style>, the one with the lowest <style="Stat_Health">Health</style> is removed before the new Drone is summoned.
The target also gains a <style="Debuff_Markerlight">Markerlight</style> until the end of <style="Faction_Tau">Sho'syl's</style> next turn.

MV71 Sniper Drones' stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>
text.nextLevelDescription:
MV71 Sniper Drones' stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Saviour Protocols
text.currentLevelDescription:
If a friendly adjacent <style="Faction_Tau">T'au Empire</style> unit is attacked, there is a <style="Stat_Chance">{[chance]}%</style> chance for each hit to be scored against this Drone instead of the original target.

When moving, this Drone prioritises hexes adjacent to friendly <style="Faction_Tau">T'au Empire</style> units. 

When attacking, this Drone tries to prioritise enemies with a <style="Debuff_Markerlight">Markerlight</style>.

text.name: Early Warning Override
text.currentLevelDescription:
Summons 2 <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Tau">Shield Drones</style></style> into free adjacent hexes. Newly summoned <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Tau">Shield Drones</style></style> can immediately attack an enemy in <style="Stat_Melee">melee</style>, but cannot move this turn.
<style="Faction_Tau">Re'vas</style> also starts <style="Buff_Overwatching">Overwatching</style> until the start of her next turn, dealing <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>. When defeating a unit while <style="Buff_Overwatching">Overwatching</style>, she remains in <style="Buff_Overwatching">Overwatch</style>, retaining {[hitsReduction]} fewer <style="Stat_Hits">hits</style> compared to the previous attack. 

Shield Drones' stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>
text.nextLevelDescription:
Now deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> when <style="Buff_Overwatching">Overwatching</style>.

Shield Drones' stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Cyclic Ion Blaster
text.currentLevelDescription:
All attacks deal an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Particle">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Particle Damage</style>.
If the target has a <style="Debuff_Markerlight">Markerlight</style> or the <style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style> trait these hits deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription:
All attacks deal an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Particle">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Particle Damage</style>.
If the target has a <style="Debuff_Markerlight">Markerlight</style> or the <style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style> trait these hits deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Fighting Retreat
text.currentLevelDescription: Adjacent enemies gain a Markerlight. They also have {[hitsReduction]} fewer hits, to a minimum of one, and deal -{[dmgReduction]} Damage for one round. Until the end of this turn, Darkstrider and adjacent allied units with the Ranged Specialist trait gain the effect of the trait even if they started their turn adjacent to an enemy unit. Using Fighting Retreat does not end Darkstrider's turn if he is adjacent to an enemy, and he can move again if already moved in this turn.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected enemies now deal <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReduction]} Damage</style> for one round.

text.name: Structural Analyser
text.currentLevelDescription:
Units hit by ranged attacks from <style="Faction_Tau">Darkstrider</style> receive a <style="Debuff_Markerlight">Markerlight</style> for one round.

Friendly units adjacent to Darkstrider deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> with ranged attacks against targets with a <style="Debuff_Markerlight">Markerlight</style>. Friendly <style="Faction_Tau">T'au Empire</style> units within 2 hexes of Darkstrider are also affected.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected units now deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> with ranged attacks against targets with a <style="Debuff_Markerlight">Markerlight</style>.

text.name: Inspired to Greatness
text.currentLevelDescription: Enables a friendly unit in an adjacent hex to use their active ability again in this battle and heals or repairs it for {[hpToHeal]} Health. For this second use, the ability is at the lowest of its own level and that of Inspired to Greatness. If that unit has not used their active ability yet, then {[hpToHeal_2]} Health is restored instead.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now <style="Healing">heals</style> or <style="Repairing">repairs</style> for <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal]} Health</style>, or <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal_2]} Health</style> if the targeted unit has not used their active ability yet.

text.name: Serene Unifier
text.currentLevelDescription:
<style="Faction_Tau">Aun'Shi</style> grants himself, and adjacent friendly units a bonus based on the current round at the beginning of his turn. Friendly <style="Faction_Tau">T'au Empire</style> units within {[range]} hexes also receive this bonus. The bonus lasts until the start of the unit's next turn, even if <style="Faction_Tau">Aun'Shi</style> is defeated. The following Buffs are granted subsequently in each round:

1: <style="BUFF_no_underscore">Sense of Stone</style>: units take <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style>
2: <style="BUFF_no_underscore">Zephyr's Grace</style>: units receive <style="Stat_Movement">+{[extraMovement]} Movement</style>
3: <style="BUFF_no_underscore">Storm of Fire</style>: units gain <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>

After round 3, the cycle begins again and will continue to repeat until <style="Faction_Tau">Aun'Shi</style> is defeated.
text.nextLevelDescription:
<style="BUFF_no_underscore">Sense of Stone</style>: units take <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style>
<style="BUFF_no_underscore">Zephyr's Grace</style>: units receive <style="Stat_Movement">+{[extraMovement]} Movement</style>
<style="BUFF_no_underscore">Storm of Fire</style>: units gain <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>

text.name: Exemplar of the Kauyon
text.currentLevelDescription:
<style="Faction_Tau">Commander Shadowsun</style> disappears, then reappears on a target hex adjacent to an allied unit and immediately performs a <style="NormalAttack">normal attack</style> against the closest enemy target. This attack deals an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[dmg]} Blast Damage</style>. A stationary <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Tau">Command-Link Drone</style></style> is summoned in the hex she previously occupied.

<style="Cooldown">Initial cooldown: {[initialCooldownTurns]} round</style>.

Command-Link Drone stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>
text.nextLevelDescription:
The <style="NormalAttack">normal attack</style> now deals an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[dmg]} Blast Damage</style>.

Command-Link Drone stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Defender of the Greater Good
text.currentLevelDescription: Friendly units adjacent to <style="Faction_Tau">Shadowsun</style> or her <style="Faction_Tau">Command-Link Drone</style> deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> with ranged attacks, except attacks that deal <style="DMG_Psychic">Psychic</style> Damage. Affected attacks also have a <style="Stat_Chance">chance</style> to score an additional <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style>. This chance is <style="Stat">{[chance]}%</style> for each round in which Shadowsun has been on the battlefield. Friendly <style="Faction_Tau">T'au Empire</style> units within 2 hexes of Shadowsun or her Command-Link Drone are also affected by this ability.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected ranged attacks now deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Fragstorm
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> to a target within {[range]} hexes and <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> to up to {[nrOfTargets]} random hexes adjacent to the target, excluding hexes with friendly units on them.
text.nextLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> to a target within {[range]} hexes and <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> to up to {[nrOfTargets]} random hexes adjacent to the target, excluding hexes with friendly units on them.

text.name: Rapid Fire
text.currentLevelDescription: The <style="Faction_Ultramarines">Heavy Intercessor</style> attacks twice if he did not move this turn, with each of the two attacks dealing <style="Stat_Damage">Damage</style> as normal.

text.name: Armour power-up
text.currentLevelDescription: When picked up by a unit, this power-up increases their <style="Stat_Armor">Armour</style> by an amount equal to {[healthPct]}% of their max <style="Stat_Health">Health</style>.

text.name: Damage power-up
text.currentLevelDescription: When picked up by a unit, this power-up increases their <style="Stat_Damage">Damage</style> by {[dmgPct]}%.

text.name: Health power-up
text.currentLevelDescription: When picked up by a unit, this power-up increases their <style="Stat_Health">Health</style> by an amount equal to {[healthPct]}% of their max <style="Stat_Health">Health</style>.

text.name: Hits power-up
text.currentLevelDescription: When picked up by a unit, this power-up increases the number of <style="Stat_Hits">hits</style> on their attacks by +{[extraHit]}.

text.name: Reactivate ability power-up
text.currentLevelDescription: When picked up by a unit, this power-up allows them to use their active ability again during the ongoing battle.

text.name: Healing power-up
text.currentLevelDescription: When picked up by a unit, this power-up <style="Healing">heals</style> that unit for {[HealPercentage]}% of their max <style="Stat_Health">Health</style>.

text.name: Melee hits power-up
text.currentLevelDescription: When picked up by a unit, this power-up increases the number of <style="Stat_Hits">hits</style> on their <style="Stat_Melee">melee</style> attack by +{[extraHit]}.

text.name: Reinforcement Point power-up
text.currentLevelDescription: Adds 1 Reinforcement point when picked up by a friendly unit.

text.name: Shield power-up
text.currentLevelDescription: When picked up by a unit, each deployed character in this event will deploy with a <style="Buff_Shield">Shield</style> equal to {[shieldPct]}% of their max <style="Stat_Health">Health</style>. The shield strength accumulates with each additional Shield power-up you pick up.

text.name: Resurrection power-up
text.currentLevelDescription:
When picked up by a friendly unit, resurrects a chosen <style="Character">character</style> that has been defeated. The resurrected character spawns in a random free hex and can immediately take a turn. 

If there is no eligible character,  it adds 1 Reinforcement point instead.

text.name: Bomb power-up
text.currentLevelDescription: When picked up by a friendly unit, triggers an explosion that deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> to all enemies within {[range]} hexes of the pick-up hex. The damage is increased at higher rarity tiers.

text.name: From Golden Light
text.currentLevelDescription: When picked up by a friendly unit, deploys <style="Faction_Custodes">Aesoth</style> onto the battlefield. They can be controlled like other friendly <style="Character">characters</style>. If possible, they try to deploy onto the hex of an enemy unit, and the enemy on that hex is <style="Obliterated">always overkilled</style>.

text.name: From Golden Light
text.currentLevelDescription: When picked up by a friendly unit, deploys <style="Faction_Custodes">Kariyan</style> onto the battlefield. They can be controlled like other friendly <style="Character">characters</style>. If possible, they try to deploy onto the hex of an enemy unit, and the enemy on that hex is <style="Obliterated">always overkilled</style>.

text.name: BLADE OF THE ANCESTORS
text.currentLevelDescription: When picked up by a friendly unit, deploys <style="Faction_LeaguesOfVotann">Uthar</style> onto the battlefield. They can be controlled like other friendly <style="Character">characters</style>. If possible, they try to deploy onto the hex of an enemy unit, and the enemy on that hex is <style="Obliterated">always overkilled</style>.

text.name: Inceptor Power-up
text.currentLevelDescription:
Summons <style="Summon">Inceptor</style>.

Inceptor's stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
