text.name: Hellfire Shells
text.currentLevelDescription: Fires a burst of Hellfire shells at a target within {[range]} hexes. The shells deal {[nrOfHits]}x {[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Piercing Damage and +{[extraHit]}x hits against Big Targets. Rapid Fire does not apply to this ability.
text.nextLevelDescription: Fires a burst of Hellfire shells at a target within {[range]} hexes. The shells deal {[nrOfHits]}x {[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Piercing Damage and +{[extraHit]}x hits against Big Targets. Rapid Fire does not apply to this ability.

text.name: Firing Position
text.currentLevelDescription: When defeating a unit with an attack triggered by <style="Overwatch">Overwatch</style>, the <style="Faction_BlackLegion">Havoc</style> stays in <style="Overwatch">Overwatch</style>, retaining {[hitsReduction]} fewer <style="Stat_Hits">hits</style> compared to the previous attack.

text.name: Needs More Dakka!
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_Orks">Ghazghkull</style> faces in one of 6 directions and loads up Mork's Roar as he prepares to open fire on an area in range {[range]} in front of him. At the beginning of his next turn, all units in the marked area receive <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Projectile">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Projectile Damage</style> while he unleashes an intense hail of bullets. Targets adjacent to <style="Faction_Orks">Ghazghkull</style> receive <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> additional hits. Friendly Orks receive <style="Stat_Hits">{[hitsReductionPct]}%</style> fewer hits.

text.name: Da Great Waaagh!
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_Orks">Ghazghkull</style> summons <style="Stat">{[nrOfSummons_2]}</style> <style="Summon2">Stormboy</style> for each enemy on the map plus <style="Stat">{[nrOfSummons]}</style> additional <style="Summon">Ork Boyz</style>, who appear on free hexes near the top of the map. Then each <style="Faction_Orks">Ork</style> takes a normal turn, gaining <style="Stat_Movement">+{[extraMovement]} Movement</style> and <style="Stat_Hits">+{[extraHit]} hit</style> on their <style="Stat_Melee">melee</style> attacks this turn.

text.name: 'Ere We Go!
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_Orks">Ghazghkull</style> faces in one of 6 directions and prepares to charge out to range {[range]} in front of him. At the start of his next turn he charges along that path, leaving devastation in his wake. Enemy <style="Summon">Summons</style> in the path are automatically defeated. Each enemy <style="Character">Character</style> on the path takes <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Direct">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Direct Damage</style> and is <style="Debuff_Stunned">Stunned</style> for 1 round. <style="Faction_Orks">Orks</style> in the path also get <style="Debuff_Stunned">Stunned</style> for 1 round but take no Damage. All units defeated by this ability are <style="Obliterated">always overkilled</style>.

text.name: Proper Killy
text.currentLevelDescription: Always eager to engage the toughest foe, <style="Faction_Orks">Ghazghkull</style>'s melee attack prioritises the unit with the highest current health total. He slashes with Gork's Klaw, attacking all enemies in the 3 hexes in front of him. Each target takes <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]} hit</style> that deals {[dmgPct]}% of their <style="Stat_Health">Max Health</style> as <style="DMG_Power">Power Damage</style>. When damage is dealt this way, each target hit is also <style="Debuff_Stunned">Stunned</style> for 1 round. Afterwards each target is hit with <style="Faction_Orks">Ghazghkull</style>'s <style="NormalAttack">normal melee attack</style>.

text.name: Prophet of Gork and Mork
text.currentLevelDescription: After being attacked <style="Stat">{[nrOfAttacks]}</style> times in a turn, <style="Faction_Orks">Ghazghkull</style> takes <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgPctReduction]}% Damage</style> until the end of that turn.

text.name: Da Boss Is Watchin'
text.currentLevelDescription: Adjacent <style="Faction_Orks">Orks</style> ignore <style="Battle_Fatigue">Battle Fatigue</style> and deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style>.

text.name: Clusta Bomma Precishun Strike
text.currentLevelDescription: At the end of <style="Faction_Orks">Tanksmasha's</style> turn, <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Orks">Grots</style></style> and <style="Object2">Explosive Oil Drums</style> rain from the sky. If an Explosive Oil Drum gets destroyed, it explodes, damaging units on adjacent hexes. Tanksmasha loses <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style> from the explosion and all other characters take <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]} hit</style> that inflicts <style="DMG_Blast">Blast Damage</style> equal to {[dmgPct]}% of the character's maximum <style="Stat_Health">Health</style>. All affected <style="Summon">Summons</style> are destroyed.

text.name: Big Boom
text.currentLevelDescription: Explodes when destroyed, damaging units on adjacent hexes. <style="Faction_Orks">Tanksmasha</style> loses <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style> from the explosion and all other characters take <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]} hit</style> that inflicts <style="DMG_Blast">Blast Damage</style> equal to {[dmgPct]}% of the character's maximum <style="Stat_Health">Health</style>. All affected <style="Summon">Summons</style> are destroyed.

text.name: Split
text.currentLevelDescription:
When this unit gets defeated, it summons 2 <style="Summon"><style="Faction_ThousandSons">Blue Horrors</style></style> in adjacent hexes. Does not apply if <style="Overkill">Overkilled</style>. Newly summoned <style="Summon"><style="Faction_ThousandSons">Blue Horrors</style></style> can immediately attack an enemy if summoned during the <style="Summon"><style="Faction_ThousandSons">Pink Horror</style></style>'s turn, but cannot move until their next turn.

Blue Horror's stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>

text.name: Flames of Mutation
text.currentLevelDescription: When this unit gets defeated it sets its hex on <style="Effect_Fire">Fire</style>. Does not apply if <style="Overkill">Overkilled</style>.

text.name: Time Flux
text.currentLevelDescription:
At the beginning of his turn, <style="Faction_ThousandSons">Toth</style> <style="Regenerate">regenerates</style> <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal]} Health</style> plus an additional amount equal to the <style="Stat_Damage">Damage</style> of the last <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style> he received in the last enemy turn. The total amount restored cannot exceed <style="Stat_Health">{[maxHpToHeal]} Health</style>.

When <style="Faction_ThousandSons">Toth</style> moves, he leaves a time ghost behind on the hex he moved from. The time ghost vanishes if the hex becomes occupied by another unit or if the terrain becomes impassable (as with <style="Tile_Floe">Broken Ice</style>). The first time <style="Faction_ThousandSons">Toth</style> dies each battle, if his time ghost is on the battlefield then he revives with <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style> remaining at its location. This works even if <style="Faction_ThousandSons">Toth</style> is <style="Overkill">Overkilled</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now <style="Regenerate">regenerates</style> <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal]} Health</style> with a maximum of <style="Stat_Health">{[maxHpToHeal]} Health</style>, and revives with <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style> remaining.

text.name: All is Dust
text.currentLevelDescription: Attacks against this unit with <style="Piercing_Ratio">{[pierceRatio]}% pierce ratio</style> or less are treated as having a <style="Piercing_Ratio">1% pierce ratio</style>.

text.name: Hellfyre Missile Rack
text.currentLevelDescription:
Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Heavy">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Heavy Round Damage</style> to a target enemy unit within range {[range]} and an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Heavy">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Heavy Round Damage</style> to each enemy unit on the map that was dealt <style="DMG_Psychic">Psychic Damage</style> this turn, which can include the initial target again.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Heavy">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Heavy Round Damage</style>.

text.name: Slashing Dive
text.currentLevelDescription: Flies over and deals a wave of damage from an initial melee target to targets up to 2 hexes behind. <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[dmg[0]]} Power Damage</style> to first target, <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[dmg[1]]} Power Damage</style> to the second, and <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[dmg[2]]} Power Damage</style> to the third. Lands in the hex directly behind the last target hit, or - in case that hex is occupied - to the closest free hex to it.

text.name: Malefic Maelstrom
text.currentLevelDescription:
Summon a <style="Summon"><style="Faction_ThousandSons">Pink Horror</style></style> on a free hex adjacent to <style="Faction_ThousandSons">Abraxas</style>. Until the end of this turn, whenever an enemy unit is dealt <style="DMG_Psychic">Psychic Damage</style>, summon a <style="Summon2"><style="Faction_ThousandSons">Screamer of Tzeentch</style></style> on a free hex adjacent to <style="Faction_ThousandSons">Abraxas</style>, preferring hexes adjacent to enemy units. Newly summoned units can immediately attack an enemy in range but cannot move.

Pink Horror stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>

Screamer of Tzeentch stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp_2]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg_2]} Damage</style>
text.nextLevelDescription:
Pink Horror stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>

Screamer of Tzeentch stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp_2]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg_2]} Damage</style>

text.name: Infernal Pacts
text.currentLevelDescription: Friendly <style="Aliance_Chaos">Chaos</style> units adjacent to <style="Faction_ThousandSons">Abraxas</style> deal an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage</style> with their <style="NormalAttack">normal ranged attacks</style>. Affected <style="Daemon">Daemons</style> also gain the bonus <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style> on their <style="NormalAttack">normal melee attack</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected units now deal an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage</style>.

text.name: Sorcerous Facade
text.currentLevelDescription: Target a friendly Psyker. Until the beginning of Yazaghor's next turn both he and the target deal an additional {[nrOfHits]}x {[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage with their normal attacks. Yazaghor performs a normal attack against the closest enemy unit, and then switches positions with the targeted Psyker. Note: this ability can only be used if Yazaghor has an enemy in range.
text.nextLevelDescription: Both <style="Faction_ThousandSons">Yazaghor</style> and the targeted  <style="Psyker">Psyker</style> now deal an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage</style> with their normal attacks.

text.name: Reality Unbound
text.currentLevelDescription: For each different enemy unit that was dealt <style="DMG_Psychic">Psychic Damage</style> this turn <style="Faction_ThousandSons">Yazaghor</style> deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraMaxDmg]} Maximum Damage</style> with his <style="NormalAttack">normal ranged attacks</style>. If three or more different enemy units have been dealt <style="DMG_Psychic">Psychic Damage</style> this turn he gains <style="Stat_Movement">+{[extraMovement]} Movement</style> and his normal ranged attack gets <style="Stat_Range">+{[extraRange]} Range</style> until the end of this turn.
text.nextLevelDescription: <style="Faction_ThousandSons">Yazaghor</style> now deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraMaxDmg]} Maximum Damage</style> with his normal ranged attacks for each different enemy unit that was dealt <style="DMG_Psychic">Psychic Damage</style> this turn.

text.name: Attempted Possession
text.currentLevelDescription: Target an enemy within {[range]} hexes. The target and any <style="Summon">Summons</style> it has summoned become possessed and immediately perform a <style="NormalAttack">normal attack</style> against the closest enemy unit, preferring unpossessed targets. Possessed units deal <style="Stat">{[dmgPct]}%</style> of their own <style="Stat_Damage">Damage</style> to a maximum of <style="Stat_Damage">{[maxDmg]} Damage</style> per <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style>. Possessed <style="Summon">Summons</style> will move before attacking.
text.nextLevelDescription: Possessed units now deal <style="Stat">{[dmgPct]}% </style> of their own <style="Stat_Damage">Damage</style> to a maximum of <style="Stat_Damage">{[maxDmg]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Arcane Shield
text.currentLevelDescription:
After moving, <style="Faction_ThousandSons">Thaumachus</style> applies a <style="Buff_Shield">Shield</style> to the closest friendly unit within {[range]} hexes, preferring <style="Faction_ThousandSons">Thousand Sons</style> units, then other <style="Aliance_Chaos">Chaos</style> units, then other friendly units, and lastly casting it on himself if there is no other valid target. The shield has <style="Stat_Health">{[shieldHp]} Health</style> and lasts one round.

If <style="Faction_ThousandSons">Thaumachus</style> does not move, then this ability triggers at the end of his turn.
text.nextLevelDescription: The <style="Buff_Shield">Shield</style> now has <style="Stat_Health">{[shieldHp]} Health</style>

text.name: Doombolt
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals {[nrOfHits]}x {[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage, evenly distributing the hits between all enemies within {[range]} hexes. Adds +1 hit for each hex on the battlefield that is currently on Fire. Cannot exceed 9 hits. When Ahriman defeats an enemy with his normal ranged attack and Doombolt has already been used, then Doombolt can be used again in this battle.
text.nextLevelDescription: Each <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style> now deals <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage</style>

text.name: Psychic Stalk
text.currentLevelDescription:
Attacks that deal <style="DMG_Flame">Flame Damage</style> and <style="DMG_Psychic">Psychic Damage</style> to enemies that are on hexes with <style="Effect_Fire">Fire</style> deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style>. Affected attacks from friendly <style="Aliance_Chaos">Chaos</style> units deal an additional <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>.

The hex of each enemy that is hit by <style="Faction_ThousandSons">Ahriman</style>'s <style="NormalAttack">normal ranged attack</style> catches <style="Effect_Fire">Fire</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected attacks now deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style> and affected attacks from friendly <style="Aliance_Chaos">Chaos</style> units now deal an additional <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Tzeentch's Firestorm
text.currentLevelDescription:
Marks all hexes exactly {[range_2]} hexes away from <style="Faction_ThousandSons">Magnus</style> in a ring around him. At the beginning of his next turn, all enemy units on marked hexes receive <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x </style> <style="DMG_Flame">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Flame Damage</style>. For the next 2 turns, the process repeats, reducing the ring radius by {[range]} and increasing hits to enemies in marked hexes by <style="Stat_Hits">{[extraHits]}</style> each turn. Magnus can move independently of the ring after the initial turn of casting.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}

text.name: Treason of Tzeentch
text.currentLevelDescription: Teleports an enemy character to another random hex and creates a copy of the character in its old location. The copy fights on the side of <style="Faction_ThousandSons">Magnus</style> and has <style="Stat">{[hpPct]}%</style> of the original character's maximum <style="Stat_Health">Health</style>. All other stats and ability levels are identical.

text.name: Blade of Magnus
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage</style> to a target enemy within <style="Stat">2</style> hexes and all enemies adjacent to it. This damage is increased by <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> if the affected units are on <style="Effect_Fire">Fire</style> hexes.

text.name: Gaze of Magnus
text.currentLevelDescription:
At the end of each of his turns, <style="Faction_ThousandSons">Magnus</style> turns his Gaze upon an enemy <style="Character">Character</style>, choosing a <style="Psyker">Psyker</style> if possible. At the beginning of Magnus' next turn, if that character is a Psyker or attacked Magnus while under the Gaze, it takes <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x </style> <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage</style> and if it is a Psyker, it is <style="Debuff_Stunned">Stunned</style> for 1 round. Scores <style="Stat_Hits">+{[extraHit]}x hit</style> for each turn in a row that Magnus targets the same character with the Gaze.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}

text.name: Psychic Dominion
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_ThousandSons">Magnus</style> takes  <style="DMG_Psychic">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Psychic Damage</style> and <style="Psyker">Psykers</style> receive <style="Stat_Damage">+{[dmgPct]}% Damage</style> from his attacks.

text.name: Impossible Form
text.currentLevelDescription: Each turn, the 9th attack and every 9th additional attack against <style="Faction_ThousandSons">Magnus</style> deal <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style>.

text.name: Illusions of Tzeentch
text.currentLevelDescription: At the start of the battle, creates a copy of the enemy team to fight for him. Copies have the same stats and ability levels as the original units. As long as one of these copies is on the battlefield, reduce all incoming damage to <style="Faction_ThousandSons">Thaumachus</style> by <style="Stat_Damage">{[dmgReductionPct]}%</style>. Each time a copied character is defeated for the first time, Thaumachus loses <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style>.

text.name: Screamer Invocation
text.currentLevelDescription:
The first time there are no allied <style="Daemon">Daemons</style> on the battlefield at the end of his turn, <style="Faction_ThousandSons">Abraxas</style> summons <style="Stat">{[nrOfSummons]}</style> <style="Summon"><style="Faction_ThousandSons">Screamers</style></style> onto random hexes on the battlefield. When a friendly Daemon is defeated, Abraxas loses <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style>. As long as there are friendly Daemons on the battlefield, all incoming damage to Abraxas is reduced by <style="Stat_Damage">{[dmgReductionPct]}%</style>.

Screamer of Tzeentch stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>

text.name: Great Frost Axe
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Piercing">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Piercing Damage</style> to an adjacent enemy and covers the hex the enemy stands on and all hexes adjacent to it in <style="Effect_Ice">Ice</style>. The <style="Stat_CritDamage">Crit Damage</style> bonus of the <style="Effect_Ice">Ice</style> is already applied for this attack.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Piercing">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Piercing Damage</style>.

text.name: Savage Killer
text.currentLevelDescription: When a <style="Summon">Summon</style> moves to or is summoned adjacent to <style="Faction_SpaceWolves">Ulf</style>, he immediately deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style> to it. <style="Faction_SpaceWolves">Ulf</style> will also perform this ability against any enemy that attempts to use an active ability while in a hex adjacent to him, in which case he deals his <style="Stat_Damage">Damage</style> before that unit's ability is activated.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style>

text.name: Grapnel Launcher
text.currentLevelDescription: Targets an enemy unit within {[range]} hexes and deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Physical">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Physical Damage</style> to it. If <style="Faction_SpaceWolves">Tjark</style> is not already adjacent to the target, it is then <style="Displacement">pulled</style> 1 hex towards <style="Faction_SpaceWolves">Tjark</style> if possible, and can be pulled over any elevation but not through impassable terrain. <style="Faction_SpaceWolves">Tjark</style> then moves to occupy the hex the target originally occupied if it's free, or a free adjacent hex if it is not. If there are no free hexes, then <style="Faction_SpaceWolves">Tjark</style> does not move.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Physical">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Physical Damage</style>.

text.name: Hunters Beyond Death
text.currentLevelDescription:
Deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> against <style="Psyker">Psykers</style>, and enemy <style="Psyker">Psykers</style> within 2 hexes deal <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReduction]} Damage</style>.

Unless they are <style="Immune">Immune</style>, Enemy <style="Psyker">Psykers</style> within 2 hexes will not hit an additional unit with their <style="NormalAttack">normal ranged attacks</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription:
Now deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> against <style="Psyker">Psykers</style>.

Enemy <style="Psyker">Psykers</style> within 2 hexes now deal <style="Stat_Damage">{[dmgReduction]} Damage</style> less.

text.name: Foehammer
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style> to an enemy within range {[range]} and the target is <style="Debuff_Stunned">Stunned</style> until the beginning of <style="Faction_SpaceWolves">Arjac</style>'s next turn. For each <style="Character">Character</style> that has been defeated in this battle, this ability deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style> and <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> for each <style="Character">Character</style> that has been defeated this battle.

text.name: Anvil Shield
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_SpaceWolves">Arjac</style> blocks an additional <style="Stat_Damage">{[blockDmg]} Damage</style> and when he <style="Stat_Block">Blocks</style> he covers the attacker's hex in <style="Effect_Ice">Ice</style>. If <style="Faction_SpaceWolves">Arjac</style> is below <style="Stat_Health">{[healthPct]}% Health</style>, or if his attacker is on a hex covered in <style="Effect_Ice">Ice</style>, he gains <style="Stat">+{[blockChance]}%</style> <style="Stat_Block">Block</style> <style="Stat_Chance">chance</style> and if he blocks a melee attack, the attacker is <style="Debuff_Stunned">Stunned</style> until the end of the attacker's next turn.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now blocks an additional <style="Stat_Damage">{[blockDmg]} Damage</style> when he <style="Stat_Block">Blocks</style> and the bonus <style="Stat_Block">Block</style> <style="Stat_Chance">chance</style> is <style="Stat">+{[blockChance]}%</style>

text.name: War Howl
text.currentLevelDescription: If Ragnar has not moved, he and all friendly Characters that don't have a normal ranged attack gain Unstoppable until the end of this turn. Additionally, their normal melee attacks have +{[extraCritChance]}% Crit Chance and deal +{[extraDmg]} Damage until the end of this turn. Using War Howl does not end Ragnar's turn.
text.nextLevelDescription: <style="NormalAttack">Normal melee attacks</style> of affected units now have <style="Stat">+{[extraCritChance]}% Crit Chance</style> and deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Saga of the Warrior Born
text.currentLevelDescription:
[i2p_Plural]When <style="Charging">charging</style>, <style="Faction_SpaceWolves">Ragnar</style> scores <style="Stat">{[extraHits]}</style> additional <style="Stat_Hits">hits</style> and his critical hits deal an additional <style="Stat_CritDamage">+{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage</style>. 
If Ragnar has defeated one or more enemy <style="Character">Characters</style> this battle, friendly <style="Faction_SpaceWolves">Space Wolves</style> also gain this ability.[i2p_One]When <style="Charging">charging</style>, <style="Faction_SpaceWolves">Ragnar</style> scores <style="Stat">{[extraHits]}</style> additional <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style> and his critical hits deal an additional <style="Stat_CritDamage">+{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage</style>.

If Ragnar has defeated one or more enemy <style="Character">Characters</style> this battle, friendly <style="Faction_SpaceWolves">Space Wolves</style> also gain this ability.
text.nextLevelDescription: [i2p_Plural]When <style="Charging">charging</style>, <style="Faction_SpaceWolves">Ragnar</style> now scores <style="Stat">{[extraHits]}</style> additional <style="Stat_Hits">hits</style> and his critical hits deal an additional <style="Stat_CritDamage">+{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage</style>.[i2p_One]When <style="Charging">charging</style>, <style="Faction_SpaceWolves">Ragnar</style> now scores <style="Stat">{[extraHits]}</style> additional <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style> and his critical hits deal an additional <style="Stat_CritDamage">+{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage</style>.

text.name: Stormcaller
text.currentLevelDescription:
Target an enemy unit within {[range]} hexes. The target's hex and all adjacent hexes get covered in <style="Effect_Ice">Ice</style>. All enemies on hexes covered in <style="Effect_Ice">Ice</style> take <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage</style>. Flying enemies damaged this way get <style="Debuff_Stunned">Stunned</style> for 1 round.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}
text.nextLevelDescription: All enemies on hexes covered in <style="Effect_Ice">Ice</style> now take <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage</style>.

text.name: Lord Of Tempests
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_SpaceWolves">Njal</style>'s <style="NormalAttack">normal attacks</style> deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> for each hex surrounding him that is covered in <style="Effect_Ice">Ice</style>. The hex of each enemy that is hit by <style="Faction_SpaceWolves">Njal</style>'s normal attacks is covered in <style="Effect_Ice">Ice</style> at the end of the attack.
text.nextLevelDescription: <style="Faction_SpaceWolves">Njal</style>'s normal attacks now deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> for each hex surrounding him that is covered in <style="Effect_Ice">Ice</style>.

text.name: Mortarion's Plague Wind
text.currentLevelDescription:
Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage</style> to a target within {[range]} hexes. Any enemies adjacent to the initial target take <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} Psychic Damage</style>. Any further enemies adjacent to at least one secondary target take <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg_3]}-{[maxDmg_3]} Psychic Damage</style>. <style="Summon">Summons</style> take double damage.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}

text.name: The Lantern
text.currentLevelDescription:
Conjures a miasma of pestilence in one of six directions that fills a 3x3 hex area adjacent to <style="Faction_DeathGuard">Mortarion</style>. Enemy units hit by the miasma are <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppressed</style>. At the beginning of <style="Faction_DeathGuard">Mortarion</style>'s next turn he fires The Lantern's beam in an arc over the affected area, dealing <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Energy">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Energy Damage</style> to each enemy unit in the area.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}

text.name: Reaping Scythe
text.currentLevelDescription: Attacks a unit in melee by swinging Silence in a wide arc, hitting the target and all enemy units adjacent to the target for <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Chain">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Chain Damage</style>. Mortarion prefers to target <style="Psyker">Psykers</style> with this ability.

text.name: Arch-Contaminator
text.currentLevelDescription:
At the beginning of his turn all adjacent enemies take <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Toxic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Toxic Damage</style> plus each <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style> also deals extra <style="Stat_Damage">Damage</style> equal to {[extraDmgPct]}-{[extraDmgPct_2]}% of the unit's max <style="Stat_Health">Health</style>. <style="Summon">Summons</style> take double damage.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}

text.name: Host Of Plagues
text.currentLevelDescription: Whenever a non-<style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style> enemy unit dies there is a <style="Stat_Chance">{[chance]}% chance</style> a <style="Summon"><style="Faction_DeathGuard">Poxwalker</style></style> is spawned on the hex where that unit died.

text.name: Revoltingly Resilient
text.currentLevelDescription: When attacked, each hit after the first {[nrOfHits]} hits in that same attack deals {[dmgPctReduction]}% less Damage than the previous hit. The first {[nrOfHits]} hits of each attack deal normal damage, the next hit 50% damage, the next hit 25%, etc.

text.name: The Wrathful Dead
text.currentLevelDescription: On each of his turns, {[nrOfSummons]} <style="Summon"><style="Faction_DeathGuard">Poxwalkers</style></style> spawn on the map in random free hexes, preferring hexes that are not adjacent to enemy <style="Character">Characters</style>. The spawned <style="Summon"><style="Faction_DeathGuard">Poxwalkers</style></style> don't move on the turn they are summoned, but will attack a target in range if there is one. Any time a friendly unit is defeated, <style="Faction_DeathGuard">Corrodius</style> also takes <style="DMG_Direct">Direct Damage</style> equal to {[healthPct]}% of the defeated unit's maximum <style="Stat_Health">Health</style>.

text.name: Dark Talon Strike
text.currentLevelDescription:
<style="Faction_DarkAngels">Azrael</style> calls in a Ravenwing Dark Talon to deal <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Direct">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Direct Damage</style> to a target enemy within {[range]} hexes and <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Bolter">{[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} Bolter Damage</style> to all enemies in an uninterrupted straight line originating from the initial target. All enemies hit are <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppressed</style>.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Direct">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Direct Damage</style> and <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Bolter">{[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} Bolter Damage</style>.

text.name: Lion Helm
text.currentLevelDescription: Friendly units within {[range]} hexes block an additional <style="Stat_Damage">{[blockDmg]} Damage</style> when they <style="Stat_Block">Block</style> and deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> with attacks triggered by <style="Overwatch">Overwatch</style>. Other friendly <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Dark Angels</style> within {[range]} hexes also have their <style="Stat_Block">Block</style> <style="Stat_Chance">chance</style> increased by <style="Stat">+{[blockChance]}%</style>
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected units now block an additional <style="Stat_Damage">{[blockDmg]} Damage</style>, deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> and have their <style="Stat_Block">Block</style> <style="Stat_Chance">chance</style> increased by <style="Stat">+{[blockChance]}%</style>.

text.name: Supercharge
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Plasma">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Plasma Damage</style> to a target enemy within range {[range]} and <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Plasma">{[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} Plasma Damage</style> to up to two enemies in adjacent hexes behind the target, all with <style="Piercing_Ratio">+{[extraPierceRatio]}% pierce ratio</style>. Until the beginning of <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Sarquael</style>'s next turn, any further <style="Stat_Hits">hits</style> that deal <style="DMG_Plasma">Plasma Damage</style> against these units also have <style="Piercing_Ratio">+{[extraPierceRatio]}% pierce ratio</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Plasma">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Plasma Damage</style> to the target enemy and <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Plasma">{[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} Plasma Damage</style> to up to two enemies in adjacent hexes behind the target. <style="Piercing_Ratio">Pierce ratio</style> is now increased by <style="Stat">+{[extraPierceRatio]}%</style>.

text.name: Grim Retribution
text.currentLevelDescription: During each enemy turn, if there is no enemy adjacent to <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Sarquael</style>, he shoots back at the first enemy within range that attacked him or a friendly adjacent <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Dark Angel</style>. This shot counts as <style="Overwatch">Overwatch</style> and deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Plasma">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Plasma Damage</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Plasma">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Plasma Damage</style>.

text.name: Exemplar of Hate
text.currentLevelDescription: Targets an enemy on the battlefield. For this round and the next, all friendly units deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> against that enemy with melee or <style="Overwatch">Overwatch</style> attacks. If that enemy is <style="Aliance_Chaos">Chaos</style>, it gets <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppressed</style> and <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Asmodai</style> or another friendly <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Dark Angel</style> immediately performs a <style="NormalAttack">normal attack</style> against the target, dealing <style="Stat">{[dmgPct]}%</style> of its own damage, to a maximum of <style="Stat_Damage">{[maxDmg]} Damage</style> per <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Friendly units now deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> with melee or <style="Overwatch">Overwatch</style> attacks. The friendly <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Dark Angel</style> now deals <style="Stat">{[dmgPct]}%</style> of its own damage, to a maximum of <style="Stat_Damage">{[maxDmg]} Damage</style> per <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style>.

text.name: Feared Interrogator
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> against enemies that are <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppressed</style>, <style="Debuff_Stunned">Stunned</style>, or that are adjacent to another friendly <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Dark Angel</style>. Scores <style="Stat">{[extraHits]}</style> additional <style="Stat_Hits">hits</style> if the enemy is also <style="Aliance_Chaos">Chaos</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> and scores <style="Stat_Hits">{[extraHits]}</style> additional hits.

text.name: Plasma Cannon
text.currentLevelDescription:
Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Plasma">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Plasma Damage</style> to an enemy within range {[range]} and up to two enemy units behind the target. This ability can be used multiple times per battle but has a <style="Cooldown">cooldown of {[cooldownTurns]} round.</style> 

<style="Cooldown">Initial cooldown: {[initialCooldownTurns]} round</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Plasma"> {[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Plasma Damage</style>

text.name: Deathwing
text.currentLevelDescription: Each time Baraqiel blocks damage during an attack, all further incoming damage is reduced by {[dmgReduction]} and the damage Baraqiel deals with melee or Plasma Cannon attacks is increased by {[extraDmg]} for 1 round. This effect is doubled against Chaos enemies or when standing adjacent to another friendly Dark Angel.
text.nextLevelDescription: Damage is now reduced by <style="Stat_Damage">{[dmgReduction]}</style> and the extra damage is increased to <style="Stat_Damage">{[extraDmg]}</style>

text.name: Deathwing
text.currentLevelDescription: Each time the <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Deathwing Knight</style> blocks damage during an attack, all further incoming damage is reduced by <style="Stat_Damage">{[dmgReduction]}</style> and the damage he deals is increased by <style="Stat_Damage">{[extraDmg]}</style> for 1 round. This effect is doubled against <style="Aliance_Chaos">Chaos</style> enemies or when standing adjacent to another friendly <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Dark Angel</style>.

text.name: Fire Discipline
text.currentLevelDescription: Ramus performs a normal attack, using {[dmgPct]}% of his own Damage stat to a maximum of {[maxDmg]} Damage. This ability can be used multiple times per battle but has a cooldown of {[cooldownTurns]} rounds. If Ramus uses this ability while adjacent to another friendly Dark Angel, then it can be used again in his next turn without cooldown. Using Fire Discipline does not end Ramus' turn and he can still enter Overwatch at the end of his turn, unless he performs another normal attack.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now uses <style="Stat">{[dmgPct]}%</style> of his own <style="Stat_Damage">Damage stat</style> to a maximum of <style="Stat_Damage">{[maxDmg]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Special-Issue Combi-Melta
text.currentLevelDescription:
<style="Faction_DarkAngels">Ramus'</style> <style="NormalAttack">normal attacks</style> are enhanced, based on the distance to his target:
Attacks <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppress</style> the target if it is exactly 3 hexes away from him.
Attacks deal an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style> if the target is exactly 2 hexes away from him.
Attacks deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> if the target is in a surrounding hex.
text.nextLevelDescription: Attacks at range 2 now deal an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style> and attacks against surrounding enemies now deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Plasma Grenade
text.currentLevelDescription:
Throws a grenade at a target within {[range]} hexes, dealing <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Plasma">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Plasma Damage</style> to it and <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Plasma">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Plasma Damage</style> to enemy units in adjacent hexes. This ability benefits from <style="Indirect_Fire">Indirect Fire</style>.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}

text.name: Battle Focus
text.currentLevelDescription: After attacking or being attacked, moves <style="Stat_Movement">1</style> hex in a direction as far away from enemies as possible.

text.name: Reveal
text.currentLevelDescription: An enemy within {[range]} hexes that is not <style="Debuff_Revealed">Revealed</style> and has defeated a friendly <style="Faction_Aeldari">Aeldari</style> unit this battle becomes <style="Debuff_Revealed">Revealed</style> for {[nrOfRounds]} rounds. Friendly <style="Faction_Aeldari">Aeldari</style> that attack <style="Debuff_Revealed">Revealed</style> enemies ignore any hit reductions and deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style>.

text.name: Conceal
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_Aeldari">Aeldari</style> units within {[range]} hexes ignore their <style="Battle_Fatigue">Battle Fatigue</style> trait, if they have it, and are treated as having the <style="Camouflage">Camouflage</style> trait.

text.name: Kiss of Death
text.currentLevelDescription: The <style="Faction_Aeldari">Harlequin Player</style> disappears and deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Direct">{[dmg]} Direct Damage</style> to an adjacent enemy, and up to {[maxAdjacentTargets]} additional enemies adjacent to a previous target, then it reappears in a hex adjacent to the last target hit.

text.name: Harlequin's Panoply
text.currentLevelDescription: The first time each turn this unit blocks a hit, all further hits of the attack are discarded and the <style="Faction_Aeldari">Harlequin Player</style> moves 1 hex closer to the origin of the attack, if possible.

text.name: Crushing Claws
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Piercing">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Piercing Damage</style> to an adjacent enemy and <style="Debuff_Taunted">Taunts</style> them for 1 round. Enemies adjacent to both the <style="Faction_Tyranids">Tyrant Guard</style> and the target take <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Physical">{[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} Physical Damage</style> and then get <style="Displacement">pushed</style> back 1 hex. All affected units become <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppressed</style> for 1 round.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Piercing">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Piercing Damage</style> to the target, and <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Physical">{[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} Physical Damage</style> to enemies adjacent to both the target and the <style="Faction_Tyranids">Tyrant Guard</style>.

text.name: Guardian Organism
text.currentLevelDescription: If the <style="Faction_Tyranids">Tyrant Guard</style> is within <style="Synapse">Synapse</style> range or did not move during its previous turn, it and friendly units affected by its <style="Big_Target">Big Target</style> trait take <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style> during the enemy's next turn, up to a maximum of <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReduction]} Damage</style> per hit.
text.nextLevelDescription: The damage reduction is now <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style>, up to a maximum of <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReduction]} Damage</style> per hit.

text.name: Alpha Warrior
text.currentLevelDescription:
If the <style="Faction_Tyranids">Winged Prime</style> has not moved this turn, summons a <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Tyranids">Tyranid Warrior</style></style> on a free hex within <style="Synapse">Synapse</style> range. The <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Tyranids">Tyranid Warrior</style></style> cannot move this turn, but can immediately perform a <style="NormalAttack">normal attack</style> against an enemy in range.

Tyranid Warrior stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>
text.nextLevelDescription:
Tyranid Warrior stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Synaptic Linchpin
text.currentLevelDescription:
Whenever the <style="Faction_Tyranids">Winged Prime</style>, or another friendly unit with <style="Synapse">Synapse</style>, performs a <style="NormalAttack">normal attack</style> against an enemy and that enemy is not defeated, summons a <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Tyranids">Hormagaunt</style></style> adjacent to the target, which immediately attacks the enemy. Cannot have more than <style="STAT">{[maxSummons]}</style> <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Tyranids">Hormagaunts</style></style> summoned this way at the same time.

Hormagaunt stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>
text.nextLevelDescription:
Cannot have more than <style="STAT">{[maxSummons]}</style> <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Tyranids">Hormagaunts</style></style> summoned this way at the same time.

Hormagaunt stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Synaptic Insight
text.currentLevelDescription: This unit's ranged attacks score <style="Stat_Hits">+{[extraHit]} hits</style> against targets that are within <style="Synapse">Synapse</style> range or adjacent to another <style="Faction_Tyranids">Tyranid</style>.

text.name: Spirit Leech
text.currentLevelDescription:
Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage</style> to an enemy unit within {[range]} hexes. If the target is <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppressed</style>, deals an additional <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>, otherwise <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppresses</style> it. The <style="Faction_Tyranids">Neurothrope</style> <style="Healing">heals</style> itself and friendly <style="Faction_Tyranids">Tyranids</style> adjacent to it for <style="Stat_Health">Health</style> equal to <style="STAT">{[hpToHealPct]}%</style> of the total damage dealt with this ability.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage</style>. If the target is <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppressed</style> deals an additional <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>, otherwise <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppresses</style> it. Now <style="Healing">heals</style> for <style="Stat_Health">Health</style> equal to <style="STAT">{[hpToHealPct]}%</style> of the total damage dealt with this ability.

text.name: Neuroparasite
text.currentLevelDescription:
Each enemy that is dealt <style="DMG_Psychic">Psychic Damage</style> by the <style="Faction_Tyranids">Neurothrope</style> is infected by a <style="Debuff_Neuroparasite">Neuroparasite</style> until either the unit is healed or the <style="Faction_Tyranids">Neurothrope</style> is defeated. Whenever a unit infected with a <style="Debuff_Neuroparasite">Neuroparasite</style> takes <style="DMG_Psychic">Psychic Damage</style> or becomes affected by an attack or ability that would <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppress</style> it, the level of the <style="Debuff_Neuroparasite">Neuroparasite</style> increases by 1, up to a maximum of <style="STAT">{[buffMaxLevel]}</style>.

<style="DMG_Psychic">Psychic Damage</style> dealt by the <style="Faction_Tyranids">Neurothrope</style> is increased by <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> for each level of a <style="Debuff_Neuroparasite">Neuroparasite</style> on the target.
text.nextLevelDescription:
The maximum level for a <style="Debuff_Neuroparasite">Neuroparasite</style> is now <style="STAT">{[buffMaxLevel]}</style>.

<style="DMG_Psychic">Psychic Damage</style> dealt by the <style="Faction_Tyranids">Neurothrope</style> is increased by <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> for each level of a <style="Debuff_Neuroparasite">Neuroparasite</style> on the target.

text.name: Death Scream
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Plasma">{[dmg]} Plasma Damage</style> to a target enemy within range {[range]} and <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Bio">{[dmg_2]} Bio Damage</style> to all enemies adjacent to the target. <style="Stat">{[stunChance]}% chance</style> to <style="Debuff_Stunned">Stun</style> all affected units for 1 round.

text.name: Unparalleled Ferocity
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Physical">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Physical Damage</style> to all adjacent enemies, with a <style="Stat">100% Crit Chance</style> against<style="Summon">Summons</style>.

text.name: Living Battering Ram
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Physical">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Physical Damage</style> to an adjacent target with a <style="Stat">{[stunChance]}% chance</style> to <style="Debuff_Stunned">stun</style> it for 1 round. The target is also <style="Displacement">thrown</style> 2 hexes away from the <style="Faction_Tyranids">Screamer-Killer</style>. If the hex the target lands in was occupied, the occupying unit will be <style="Displacement">pushed</style> 1 hex in a random direction. The target is then dealt an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Direct">{[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} Direct Damage</style>, regardless if it was thrown or not.

text.name: Adrenal Surge
text.currentLevelDescription: Each time the <style="Faction_Tyranids">Screamer-Killer</style> defeats an enemy, it gains <style="Stat">+{[extraCritChance]}% Crit Chance</style> until the end of the battle.

text.name: Blistering Assault
text.currentLevelDescription: The <style="Faction_Tyranids">Screamer-Killer</style>'s <style="NormalAttack">normal attacks</style> also affect all enemies adjacent to the target of the attack.

text.name: Hyper-Aggression
text.currentLevelDescription: Beginning on its second turn, after the <style="Faction_Tyranids">Screamer-Killer</style> uses an active ability, it also performs a <style="NormalAttack">normal attack</style>.

text.name: Vulnerable to Melee
text.currentLevelDescription: Each time this unit is dealt Damage by a <style="Stat_Melee">Melee attack</style>, it loses <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style> in addition to the damage done. This unit takes <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style> from attacks that are not <style="Stat_Melee">Melee attacks</style>.

text.name: Vulnerable to Flame and Blast
text.currentLevelDescription: Each time this unit is dealt <style="DMG_Flame">Flame Damage</style> or <style="DMG_Blast">Blast Damage</style>, it loses <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style> in addition to the damage done. This unit takes <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style> from hits that do not deal <style="DMG_Flame">Flame Damage</style> or <style="DMG_Blast">Blast Damage</style>.

text.name: Feeder Tendrils
text.currentLevelDescription: When <style="Charging">charging</style>, the <style="Faction_Tyranids">Deathleaper</style> deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>, <style="Healing">heals</style> for <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal]} Health</style> and <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppresses</style> the target for 1 round.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> and <style="Healing">heals</style> for <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal]} Health</style>.

text.name: Fear of the Unseen
text.currentLevelDescription: If the <style="Faction_Tyranids">Deathleaper</style> has not moved this turn and is not in <style="Teleport_Strike_short">Deep Strike</style>, all enemies within {[range]} hexes get <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppressed</style> and trigger <style="Battle_Fatigue">Battle Fatigue</style>, if they have it. The <style="Faction_Tyranids">Deathleaper</style> vanishes and cannot be targeted or damaged for 1 round. In its next turn, its attacks deal an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Direct">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Direct Damage</style> and it can move to any free hex on the battlefield that is either within <style="Synapse">Synapse</style> range, has <style="Tile_Grass">Tall Grass</style> or is not adjacent to an enemy.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Direct">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Direct Damage</style>.

text.name: It Itches!
text.currentLevelDescription:
<style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppresses</style> and <style="Displacement">pushes</style> an adjacent enemy unit and all enemy units adjacent to both the target and the <style="Faction_Tyranids">Parasite of Mortrex</style> one hex backwards. Enemy <style="Steppable">steppables</style> on affected hexes are destroyed. Then summons a <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Tyranids">Ripper Swarm</style></style> in each hex vacated by this ability. The <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Tyranids">Ripper Swarms</style></style> can immediately attack. The <style="Faction_Tyranids">Parasite of Mortrex</style> may move again after activating this ability.

Ripper Swarm stats:

text.currentLevelDescription:
When the <style="Faction_Tyranids">Parasite of Mortrex</style> defeats a unit it targeted that is not <style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style> it summons a <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Tyranids">Ripper Swarm</style></style> in the defeated unit's hex.
