text.name: Defend The Divine Work
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Repairing">Repairs</style> himself and all friendly adjacent units <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToRepair]} Health</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now <style="Repairing">repairs</style> <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToRepair]} Health</style>.

text.name: Galvanic Field
text.currentLevelDescription: Whenever <style="Faction_AdeptusMechanicus">Actus</style> <style="Repairing">repairs</style> another unit, that unit immediately attacks a target in range, dealing <style="Stat">{[dmgPct]}%</style> of its own <style="Stat_Damage">Damage</style> to a maximum of <style="Stat_Damage">{[maxDmg]} Damage</style> per <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style>. <style="Faction_AdeptusMechanicus">Actus</style> can <style="Repairing">repair</style> other friendly units even if they are at full <style="Stat_Health">Health</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: A friendly unit attacking due to this ability now deals <style="Stat">{[dmgPct]}% </style> of its own <style="Stat_Damage">Damage</style> to a maximum of <style="Stat_Damage">{[maxDmg]} Damage</style> per <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style>.

text.name: Rad-Bombardment
text.currentLevelDescription:
Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Toxic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Toxic Damage</style> to all units in a straight line in one of 6 directions and adds <style="Tile_Contamination">Contamination</style> to all hexes in the line. All units hit are <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppressed</style> for 1 round. The length of the line starts at 2 hexes and increases by 1 hex for each round that has passed and by 1 hex each time a friendly <style="Mechanic">Mechanic</style> restores <style="Stat_Health">Health</style> of a unit.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Toxic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Toxic Damage</style>.

text.name: Master Annihilator
text.currentLevelDescription: When Vitruvius performs a normal attack against an enemy, that enemy is affected by Master Annihilator until Vitruvius is defeated or performs a normal attack against a different unit. Attacks by any friendly unit against the affected enemy score an additional hit, except attacks that deal Psychic Damage. This additional hit can deal a maximum of {[maxDmg]} Damage.
text.nextLevelDescription: The additional <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style> can now deal a maximum of <style="Stat_Damage">{[maxDmg]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Doctrina Imperatives
text.currentLevelDescription: Tan Gi’da switches between two Imperatives that affect him and all friendly adjacent Mechanical units: Protector Imperative: Affected units have +{[extraArmor]} Armour. Conqueror Imperative: Affected units deal +{[extraDmg]} Damage against units with reduced Armour. This ability can be used once per turn instead of once per battle; each use switches the active Imperative. Tan Gi’da can attack after using this ability. Only the first use of this ability each battle counts as using an active ability.
text.nextLevelDescription:
Protector Imperative: Affected units now have <style="Stat_Armor">+{[extraArmor]} Armour</style>.
Conqueror Imperative: Affected units now deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Control Edict
text.currentLevelDescription:
While Protector Imperative is active: After <style="Faction_AdeptusMechanicus">Tan Gi’da</style> attacks, summon a <style="Summon"><style="Faction_AdeptusMechanicus">Skitarii Vanguard</style></style> in a free adjacent hex. Cannot have more than <style="Stat">{[maxSummons]}</style> <style="Summon"><style="Faction_AdeptusMechanicus">Skitarii Vanguards</style></style> summoned this way at the same time.

While Conqueror Imperative is active: After <style="Faction_AdeptusMechanicus">Tan Gi’da</style> attacks, all friendly adjacent <style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style> <style="Summon">Summons</style> also immediately attack his target if it is within range.

Skitarii Vanguard stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>
text.nextLevelDescription:
Skitarii Vanguard stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Rad-Saturation
text.currentLevelDescription: After the <style="Faction_AdeptusMechanicus">Skitarii Vanguard</style> moves, it adds <style="Tile_Contamination">Contamination</style> to its hex. If it does not move, then this ability triggers at the end of its turn.

text.name: Chordclaw
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Direct">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Direct Damage</style> to an adjacent enemy. All of <style="Faction_AdeptusMechanicus">Exitor-Rho</style>’s further attacks until the end of its next turn deal an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Direct">{[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} Direct Damage</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Direct">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Direct Damage</style> to an adjacent enemy, and further attacks now deal an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Direct">{[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} Direct Damage</style>

text.name: Optimised Gait
text.currentLevelDescription: Whenever an enemy adjacent to <style="Faction_AdeptusMechanicus">Exitor-Rho</style> is attacked by another friendly <style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style> unit, <style="Faction_AdeptusMechanicus">Exitor-Rho</style> deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Energy">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Energy Damage</style> to that enemy. If an enemy adjacent to <style="Faction_AdeptusMechanicus">Exitor-Rho</style> is defeated by a friendly <style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style> unit or an attack triggered from this ability, <style="Faction_AdeptusMechanicus">Exitor-Rho</style> moves onto its hex.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Energy">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Energy Damage</style>

text.name: Sentinel Directives
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals {[nrOfHits]}x {[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Physical Damage to an enemy unit within range {[range]} and Suppresses it for 1 round. Cannot be used if there is an enemy adjacent to Sy-Gex. Using Sentinel Directives does not end Sy-Gex's turn and he can still enter Overwatch this turn, unless he performs a normal attack.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Physical">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Physical Damage</style>

text.name: Heavy Grav-Cannon
text.currentLevelDescription: Ranged attacks against <style="Mk_Gravis">MK X Gravis</style>, <style="Terminator_Armor">Terminator Armour</style> or <style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style> units deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> and have <style="Piercing_Ratio">+{[extraPierceRatio]}% pierce ratio</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Ranged attacks against these units now deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> and have <style="Piercing_Ratio">+{[extraPierceRatio]}% pierce ratio</style>.

text.name: Pound them to Dust!
text.currentLevelDescription: Performs a <style="NormalAttack">normal attack</style> and then marks an area of up to 7 hexes. At the beginning of its next turn, the <style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Rogal Dorn Battle Tank</style> deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Heavy">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Heavy Round Damage</style> to all units in the marked area.

text.name: Gunners, Kill on Sight!
text.currentLevelDescription: Marks an area in front of the <style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Rogal Dorn Battle Tank</style> for 1 round. Whenever an enemy unit without <style="Infiltrate">Infiltrate</style> ends a move on a marked hex or before it moves out of the marked area, the <style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Rogal Dorn Battle Tank</style> deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Projectile">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Projectile Damage</style> to all units in the area. The ability ends early after <style="Stat">{[nrOfCrits]}</style> attacks against the <style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Rogal Dorn Battle Tank</style> have scored a <style="Stat_CritDamage">Crit</style>.

text.name: Armoured Might
text.currentLevelDescription: This unit’s movement is not blocked by other units, instead they get <style="Displacement">pushed</style> and take <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Melta">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Melta Damage</style>. <style="Summon">Summons</style> and units that cannot be displaced are automatically defeated, and all units defeated by this ability are <style="Obliterated">always overkilled</style>.

text.name: Weaker Rear Armour
text.currentLevelDescription: If enemies are inside the rear arc of the <style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Rogal Dorn Battle Tank</style>, their attacks have <style="Stat">+{[extraCritChance]}% Crit Chance</style> against it.

text.name: Ablative Plating
text.currentLevelDescription: Any incoming <style="Stat_Damage">Damage</style> with less than <style="Piercing_Ratio">{[pierceRatio]}% Pierce Ratio</style> must go through <style="Stat_Armor">Armour</style> three times. Does not apply to <style="Stat_CritDamage">Crits</style>.

text.name: Reinforcements!
text.currentLevelDescription: At the start of <style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Sibyll Devine’s</style> turn, <style="STAT">{[nrOfSummons]}</style> <style="Summon"><style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Cadian Guardsmen</style></style> are summoned at the top of the map and immediately take a turn. Each time a friendly <style="Summon"><style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Cadian Guardsman</style></style> is defeated, <style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Sibyll Devine</style> is dealt <style="DMG_Psychic">{[dmg]} Psychic Damage</style>.

text.name: Fields of Fire
text.currentLevelDescription: Friendly units with the <style="Emplacement">Emplacement</style> trait deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style> against units that are {[range]} or more hexes away from their own hex. Each time <style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Thaddeus Noble</style> is attacked in <style="Stat_Melee">melee</style> or would get <style="Debuff_Stunned">Stunned</style>, he loses <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style> in addition to the damage done. The first time each round he loses <style="Stat_Health">Health</style> this way, all friendly <style="Emplacement">Emplacement</style> units get <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppressed</style> for 1 round.

text.name: Bloody Fury
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Chain">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Chain Damage</style> to an adjacent enemy. This attack scores <style="Stat_Hits">+{[extraHit]}</style> hit for each time <style="Faction_WorldEaters">Wrask</style> was attacked in this battle, to a maximum of <style="Stat_Hits">{[maxNrOfHits]}</style> hits total. Any leftover hits are allocated to remaining adjacent enemies, prioritising kills.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Chain">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Chain Damage</style>.

text.name: Wrathful Devotion
text.currentLevelDescription: When <style="Faction_WorldEaters">Wrask</style> arrives from <style="Teleport_Strike_short">Deep Strike</style> or defeats an enemy in <style="Stat_Melee">melee</style>, he and adjacent friendly <style="Aliance_Chaos">Chaos</style> units gain a <style="Buff_Shield">Shield</style> with <style="Stat_Health">{[shieldHp]} Health</style> for 1 round.
text.nextLevelDescription: The <style="Buff_Shield">Shield</style> now has <style="Stat_Health">{[shieldHp]} Health</style>.

text.name: Jakhal Stimms
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals {[nrOfHits]}x {[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Physical Damage to an adjacent enemy and all other enemies adjacent to both Macer and the target. Then Macer loses {[hpPct]}% of his current Health. Using Jakhal Stimms does not end Macer's turn.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Physical">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Physical Damage</style>.

text.name: Skullsmasher
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_WorldEaters">Macer</style> deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> for each <style="Stat">{[hpPct]}%</style> of his maximum <style="Stat_Health">Health</style> he is currently missing. In addition, if <style="Faction_WorldEaters">Macer</style> has defeated an enemy this battle, all enemies he attacks become <style="Debuff_Stunned">Stunned</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now adds <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Kill! Maim! Burn!
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Piercing">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Piercing Damage</style> to an adjacent enemy. Then performs a second attack targeting an adjacent enemy, dealing <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Eviscerate">{[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} Eviscerating Damage</style>. Then performs a third attack targeting an enemy within range {[range]}, dealing <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_3]}x</style> <style="DMG_Plasma">{[minDmg_3]}-{[maxDmg_3]} Plasma Damage</style>. All attacks prioritise the same target until it is killed and then prioritise kills.
text.nextLevelDescription: First attack now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Piercing">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Piercing Damage</style>, the second attack now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Eviscerate">{[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} Eviscerating Damage</style> and the third attack now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_3]}x</style> <style="DMG_Plasma">{[minDmg_3]}-{[maxDmg_3]} Plasma Damage</style>.

text.name: The Betrayer
text.currentLevelDescription:
After performing a <style="NormalAttack">normal attack</style>, <style="Faction_WorldEaters">Khârn</style> performs a second attack against an adjacent enemy, dealing <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Eviscerate">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Eviscerating Damage</style>.

If <style="Faction_WorldEaters">Khârn</style> has defeated an enemy this battle, at the start of his turn, he automatically moves up to {[range]} hexes towards the nearest unit and then deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Eviscerate">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Eviscerating Damage</style> to an adjacent unit. <style="Faction_WorldEaters">Khârn</style> prefers enemies for this automatic move and attack, but targets friendly units if no enemy is in range.
text.nextLevelDescription: The attacks now deal <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Eviscerate">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Eviscerating Damage</style>

text.name: Murderous Swing
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Piercing">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Piercing Damage</style> to all adjacent enemies. If this attack only hits one enemy, it deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Piercing">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Piercing Damage</style> and <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> if hitting only one enemy.

text.name: Trophy Taker
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_WorldEaters">Tarvakh</style>'s attacks against units that are at or below {[hpPct]}% of their maximum <style="Stat_Health">Health</style> deal<style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> and an additional <style="Stat_CritDamage">+{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage</style>. His <style="Stat_CritDamage">Crit chance</style> is increased by <style="Stat">{[extraCritChance]}%</style> for each unit that he defeated this battle.
text.nextLevelDescription: Attacks against units that are at or below {[hpPct]}% of their maximum <style="Stat_Health">Health</style> now deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> and an additional <style="Stat_CritDamage">+{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage</style>. <style="Stat_CritDamage">Crit chance</style> is now increased by <style="Stat">{[extraCritChance]}%</style>.

text.name: Overwhelming Wrath
text.currentLevelDescription: Until the beginning of his next turn <style="Faction_WorldEaters">Azkor</style> <style="Debuff_Taunted">Taunts</style> all adjacent enemies and takes <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style> from ranged attacks. Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Eviscerate">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Eviscerating Damage</style> to all adjacent enemies at the beginning of <style="Faction_WorldEaters">Azkor's</style> next turn.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now takes <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style> from ranged attacks and deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Eviscerate">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Eviscerating Damage</style> to all adjacent enemies.

text.name: Beacon Of Rage
text.currentLevelDescription: For each time he was attacked in battle, up to a maximum of {[nrOfAttacks]} times, Azkor deals +{[extraDmg]} Damage. If Azkor has defeated an enemy in this battle, 50% of the extra damage granted by Beacon of Rage is added to the damage of melee attacks of adjacent friendly Chaos units.
text.nextLevelDescription: <style="Faction_WorldEaters">Azkor</style> now gains <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> for each time he was attacked

text.name: Echoes From the Warp
text.currentLevelDescription: When this unit moves, it leaves a time ghost behind on the hex it moved from. The time ghost vanishes if the hex becomes occupied by another unit or if the terrain becomes impassable (as with <style="Tile_Floe">Broken Ice</style>). The first time this unit dies each battle, if its time ghost is on the battlefield then it revives with <style="Stat_Health">Full Health</style> at its location. This works even if this unit is <style="Overkill">Overkilled</style>.

text.name: War Construct
text.currentLevelDescription: For 1 round, if there is no enemy adjacent to the <style="Faction_Aeldari">Wraithguard</style>, it shoots back at each enemy within range that attacks it or a friendly adjacent <style="Faction_Aeldari">Aeldari</style>.

text.name: Wraithcannon
text.currentLevelDescription: When performing a ranged attack, deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Direct">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Direct Damage</style> to an enemy behind the target.

text.name: The Wailing Doom Sweeps
text.currentLevelDescription: Faces in one of 6 directions and sets a cone of hexes in range 2 in front of it on <style="Effect_Fire">Fire</style>, dealing <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Flame">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Flame Damage</style> to all enemies on affected hexes. At the beginning of its next turn, deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Melta">{[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} Melta Damage</style> to all enemies on affected hexes.

text.name: The Wailing Doom Strikes
text.currentLevelDescription: Faces in one of 6 directions and sets all hexes in a straight line 2 hexes wide and originating from the Avatar of Khaine on <style="Effect_Fire">Fire</style>, dealing <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Flame">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Flame Damage</style> to all enemies on affected hexes. At the beginning of its next turn, deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Melta">{[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} Melta Damage</style> to all enemies on affected hexes.

text.name: The Wrath of Khaine Unleashed
text.currentLevelDescription: At the beginning of the <style="Faction_Aeldari">Avatar of Khaine</style>'s next turn, he deals <style="DMG_Flame">Flame Damage</style> to all enemies within {[range]} hexes, except enemies on healing hexes. This attack deals <style="DMG_Flame">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Flame Damage</style> per <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style> and scores <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]} hits</style> against surrounding enemies, <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]} hits</style> against enemies at range {[range_2]}, and <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_3]} hits</style> against enemies at range {[range]}. Then all <style="Effect_Fire">Fire</style> in the affected area is extinguished, and all adjacent enemies are <style="Displacement">pushed</style> one hex.

text.name: Molten Form
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="DMG_Flame">Flame</style>, <style="DMG_Plasma">Plasma</style>, and <style="DMG_Melta">Melta</style> Damage against the <style="Faction_Aeldari">Avatar of Khaine</style> is reduced by <style="Stat_Damage">{[dmgPctReduction]}%</style>.

text.name: The Bloody Handed
text.currentLevelDescription: Other friendly <style="Faction_Aeldari">Aeldari</style> units are <style="Unstoppable">Unstoppable</style> and deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> against enemies standing on <style="Effect_Fire">Fire</style>.

text.name: Blood Runs! Anger Rises! War Calls!
text.currentLevelDescription:
At the end of the <style="Faction_Aeldari">Avatar of Khaine</style>'s turn, if there are less than <style="Stat">{[nrOfUnits]}</style> <style="Faction_Aeldari">Guardian Defenders</style> on the battlefield, he summons <style="Stat">2</style> <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Aeldari">Guardian Defenders</style></style> at one of the battlefield corners. 

Guardian Defender stats
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: The Wild Host
text.currentLevelDescription:
Reduces all incoming damage by <style="Stat_Damage">{[dmgReductionPct]}%</style>. <style="Faction_Aeldari">Aethana</style> loses <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style> each time she is attacked. At the beginning of <style="Faction_Aeldari">Aethana</style>'s turn, units on marked hexes take <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Projectile">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Projectile Damage</style>, and she marks all hexes of units that attacked her last turn.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}

text.name: Phantasm
text.currentLevelDescription: As long as there is a Phantasm, all incoming damage is reduced by <style="Stat_Damage">{[dmgReductionPct]}%</style>. If <style="Faction_Aeldari">Eldryon</style> becomes the target of an attack when there is no Phantasm, he moves to a random free hex and leaves a Phantasm behind, preferring hexes within range <style="Stat">3</style> if possible. This movement can traverse impassable hexes and enemies and move between any elevation. When a unit moves onto the Phantasm it is destroyed and <style="Faction_Aeldari">Eldryon</style> loses <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style>.

text.name: Malleus Rocket Barrage
text.currentLevelDescription:
Marks a hex on the battlefield. At the beginning of the <style="MoW"><style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Field Ordnance Battery</style></style>'s next turn, it unleashes a barrage of missiles. {[nrOfProjectiles]} missiles impact on the marked hex and {[nrOfProjectiles_2]} missiles impact in hexes adjacent to the target with a maximum of {[nrOfProjectiles_3]} impacts per unit. Each impact deals <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> and all units hit get <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppressed</style>. Enemies hit within {[range]} hexes of a friendly <style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Astra Militarum</style> unit take <style="Stat">+{[extraDmg]}</style> damage from each hit.

Initial <style="Cooldown">cooldown: {[initialCooldownTurns]} round</style>. 
Cost: <style="Resource_MachinesOfWarAmmo">{[munitionsCost]} munition</style>.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}
text.nextLevelDescription: Each impact now deals <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style>. Enemies hit within 2 hexes of a friendly Astra Militarum unit take <style="Stat">+{[extraDmg]}</style> damage from each hit.

text.name: Forward Spotter
text.currentLevelDescription:
Summons a <style="Summon"><style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Cadian Guardsman</style></style> in a hex adjacent to the targeted friendly unit. The Cadian Guardsman immediately takes a turn.
 
Initial <style="Cooldown">cooldown: {[initialCooldownTurns]} rounds</style>. 

<style="Summon"><style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Cadian Guardsman</style></style> stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>
text.nextLevelDescription:
<style="Summon"><style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Cadian Guardsman</style></style> stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Hades Autocannons
text.currentLevelDescription:
Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Flame">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Flame Damage</style> to a targeted enemy <style="Summon">summon</style> and all other enemy summons within 2 hexes of the target. Can deal <style="Stat_CritDamage">{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage</style>.

Cost: <style="Resource_MachinesOfWarAmmo">{[munitionsCost]} munition</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Flame">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Flame Damage</style> and can deal <style="Stat_CritDamage">{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage</style>.

text.name: Daemonic Ordnance
text.currentLevelDescription: Sets a target hex and the two hexes behind it on Fire. If one of these hexes is already on fire, deals {[nrOfHits]}x {[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Plasma Damage to enemies on it. Can deal {[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage. The Forgefiend's Crit Chance for both its abilities is increased by {[extraCritChance]}% for each time Daemonic Ordnance is used during a battle, but after the Forgefiend causes {[nrOfHits_2]} or more critical hits during its turn, it cannot cause any critical hits anymore for the remainder of the battle. Initial cooldown: {[initialCooldownTurns]} round.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Plasma">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Plasma Damage</style> and can deal <style="Stat_CritDamage">{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage</style>. <style="Stat_CritChance">Crit Chance</style> is now increased by <style="Stat">{[extraCritChance]}%</style> with each use of the ability.

text.name: Bio-Minefield
text.currentLevelDescription: Targets an enemy on the battlefield. If there are {[nrOfSummons]} or more Spore Mines on the battlefield, all Spore Mines immediately take a turn, moving towards the target, if possible. Otherwise, summon {[nrOfSummons_2]} Spore Mines in free hexes adjacent to the target. Spore Mines have {[summonHp]} Health and deal {[nrOfHits]}x {[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Toxic Damage with Floating Death. Initial cooldown: {[initialCooldownTurns]} rounds. Cost: {[munitionsCost]} munition.
text.nextLevelDescription: The <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Tyranids">Spore Mines</style></style> now have <style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style> and deal <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Toxic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Toxic Damage</style> when exploding.

text.name: Spore Mine Launcher
text.currentLevelDescription: Summons a Spore Mine onto a free hex on the battlefield that is not adjacent to an enemy. Spore Mines have {[summonHp]} Health and deal {[nrOfHits]}x {[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Toxic Damage damage with Floating Death.
text.nextLevelDescription: The <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Tyranids">Spore Mine</style></style> now has <style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style> and deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Toxic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Toxic Damage</style> damage, when exploding.

text.name: Boss Adjutant
text.currentLevelDescription: This unit takes <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgPctReduction]}% Damage</style>. Each time this unit is dealt damage, up to <style="Stat">{[nrOfAttacks]}</style> times per turn, it loses <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style> in addition to the damage done.

text.name: Floating Death
text.currentLevelDescription:
Has +1 <style="Stat_Movement">Movement</style> when starting its turn within <style="Synapse">Synapse</style> range. This unit explodes when it attacks or if it or an adjacent friendly <style="Faction_Tyranids">Spore Mine</style> is defeated, and deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Toxic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Toxic Damage</style> to all adjacent enemies. Does not explode when <style="Overkill">overkilled</style>.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}

text.name: The Quickening
text.currentLevelDescription: Targets a hex within movement range {[range]} that is neither occupied by an enemy nor by a friendly unit in <style="Teleport_Strike_short">Deep Strike</style>. <style="Faction_BloodAngels">Mephiston</style> moves onto that hex. If a friendly unit is on that hex, that unit moves to Mephiston's previous location. All <style="Faction_BloodAngels">Blood Angels</style> moving this way perform a <style="NormalAttack">normal melee attack</style> after they move, dealing {[dmgPct]}% of their own damage to a maximum of <style="Stat_Damage">{[maxDmg]} Damage</style>. Units moving this way do not trigger <style="Buff_Overwatching">Overwatch</style> or other movement related reactions.
text.nextLevelDescription: <style="Faction_BloodAngels">Blood Angels</style> now deal {[dmgPct]}% of their own damage to a maximum of <style="Stat_Damage">{[maxDmg]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Fury of the Ancients
text.currentLevelDescription: After moving, deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage</style> to an adjacent enemy and an additional enemy adjacent to the initial one. For 2 rounds, affected units cannot be revived, <style="Healing">healed</style>, <style="Repairing">repaired</style>, nor otherwise restore {[S/Health]}. If <style="Faction_BloodAngels">Mephiston</style> does not move, this ability triggers at the end of his turn.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage</style>

text.name: Hammer of Wrath
text.currentLevelDescription:
If <style="Faction_BloodAngels">Mataneo</style> has not moved, he gains <style="Buff_Infiltrate">Infiltrate</style> until the end of this turn, <style="Charging">charges</style> an enemy target that has a free adjacent hex within movement range {[range]}, dealing <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style> to the target and <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Physical">{[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} Physical Damage</style> to all enemies adjacent to it. If Mataneo is at or below <style="Stat_Health">{[healthPct]}% Health</style>, doubles the damage dealt by this ability.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style> to the initial target and <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Physical">{[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} Physical Damage</style> to all enemies adjacent to it.

text.name: Aggressive Onslaught
text.currentLevelDescription:
When <style="Charging">charging</style>, <style="Faction_BloodAngels">Mataneo</style> summons {[nrOfSummons]} <style="Summon"><style="Faction_BloodAngels">Jump Pack Intercessors</style></style> adjacent to and immediately attacking his target. At the beginning of each of Mataneo's turns, if he is still on the battlefield, all Jump Pack Intercessors summoned this way leave the battlefield.

Jump Pack Intercessor stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>
text.nextLevelDescription:
Jump Pack Intercessor stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Black Rage
text.currentLevelDescription: If <style="Faction_BloodAngels">Lucien</style> has not moved, he is set to <style="Stat_Health">{[hpPct]}% Health</style>. He then immediately <style="Charging">charges</style> a targeted enemy in movement range and performs a <style="NormalAttack">normal melee attack</style> against it. For this attack and until the end of the battle, Lucien has <style="Stat_Movement">+{[extraMovement]} Movement</style> and deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> when <style="Charging">charging</style>. Additionally, Lucien can no longer be controlled for the rest of the battle, and moves and attacks automatically at the beginning of his turn instead.
text.nextLevelDescription: Lucien is now set to <style="Stat_Health">{[hpPct]}% Health</style> and deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Visions of Heresy
text.currentLevelDescription: After performing a <style="NormalAttack">normal attack</style>, <style="Faction_BloodAngels">Lucien</style> performs a second attack targeting an enemy within range {[range]}, dealing <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Bolter">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Bolter Damage</style>. If Lucien is at or below <style="Stat_Health">{[healthPct]}% Health</style>, all of his attacks have <style="Piercing_Ratio">+{[extraPierceRatio]}% pierce ratio</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Bolter">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Bolter Damage</style>. If at or below <style="Stat_Health">{[healthPct]}% Health</style> all attacks now have <style="Piercing_Ratio">+{[extraPierceRatio]}% pierce ratio</style>.

text.name: Red Thirst
text.currentLevelDescription: If this unit is at or below <style="Stat_Health">{[healthPct]}% Health</style>, it gains <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> and scores <style="Stat_Hits">+{[extraHit]} hit</style> when <style="Charging">charging</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: If this unit is at or below <style="Stat_Health">{[healthPct]}% Health</style>, it gains <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> and scores <style="Stat_Hits">+{[extraHit]} hit</style> when <style="Charging">charging</style>.

text.name: Blood Chalice
text.currentLevelDescription: All adjacent friendly non-mechanical units are set to <style="Stat_Health">{[healthPct]}% Health</style>. Until the start of their next turn, affected units gain <style="Piercing_Ratio">+{[extraPierceRatio]}% pierce ratio</style> with melee attacks and <style="Healing">heal</style> for <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal]} Health</style> if they perform a melee attack.
text.nextLevelDescription: Units now gain <style="Piercing_Ratio">+{[extraPierceRatio]}% pierce ratio</style> with Melee attacks and <style="Healing">heal</style> for <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal]} Health</style> if they perform a melee attack.

text.name: Sanguinary Priest
text.currentLevelDescription: After moving, all adjacent friendly non-mechanical units <style="Regenerate">regenerate</style> <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal]}-{[maxHpToHeal]} Health</style>. If <style="Faction_BloodAngels">Nicodemus</style> does not move, this ability triggers at the end of his turn.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected units now <style="Regenerate">regenerate</style> <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal]}-{[maxHpToHeal]} Health</style>.

text.name: Light of Sanguinius
text.currentLevelDescription: If <style="Faction_BloodAngels">Dante</style> has not moved, he gains <style="Buff_Infiltrate">Infiltrate</style> until the end of this turn, then <style="Charging">charges</style> an enemy target that has a free adjacent hex within movement range {[range]} and deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Melta">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Melta Damage</style> to it. The target and enemy units surrounding it deal <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style> for {[nrOfRounds]} round. This effect is doubled if they attack friendly units that are at or below <style="Stat_Health">{[healthPct]}% Health</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Melta">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Melta Damage</style> and affected enemies deal <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style>.

text.name: Lord of the Host
text.currentLevelDescription: Other friendly units within {[range]} hexes with <style="RapidAssault">Rapid Assault</style> or <style="Flying">Flying</style> deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> with melee attacks. Affected units that are at or below <style="Stat_Health">{[healthPct]}% Health</style> also score an additional <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style> with melee attacks.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected units now deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> with melee attacks.

text.name: Savage Echoes
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style> to an adjacent enemy unit. This attack deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> for each free hex adjacent to <style="Faction_BloodAngels">Cezare</style>. If Cezare is at or below <style="Stat_Health">{[healthPct]}% Health</style>, he also <style="Regenerate">regenerates</style> <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style> after using this ability.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style>. The attack now deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> for each free hex and <style="Faction_BloodAngels">Cezare</style> now <style="Regenerate">regenerates</style> <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style>.

text.name: Red Rampage
text.currentLevelDescription: After moving, <style="Faction_BloodAngels">Cezare</style> deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style> to all adjacent enemies. If he does not move, this attack triggers at the end of his turn. If Cezare defeats at least one enemy unit during his turn, he gains <style="Stat_Movement">+{[extraMovement]} Movement</style> until the end of his next turn.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style>.

text.name: Duty Eternal
text.currentLevelDescription:
Summons <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Ultramarines">Galatian</style></style> as a stationary unit in a 3 hex area on the battlefield. 
After using this ability, <style="Faction_Ultramarines">Galatian</style> can no longer be used as a <style="MoW">Machine of War</style> for the rest of the battle.

Galatian stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

Initial <style="Cooldown">cooldown: {[initialCooldownTurns]} rounds</style>. 
Cost: <style="Resource_MachinesOfWarAmmo">{[munitionsCost]} munition</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription:
Galatian stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Macro Plasma Incinerator
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Plasma">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Plasma Damage</style>

text.name: Ancient Fury
text.currentLevelDescription: Normal melee attacks also deal damage to each enemy that is adjacent to both the target and Galatian. Normal ranged attacks also deal damage to each enemy that is both adjacent to the target and exactly 2 hexes away from Galatian.

text.name: Tactical Precision
text.currentLevelDescription: Attacks a targeted adjacent enemy. If Titus has charged that enemy this turn, he deals {[nrOfHits]}x {[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Bolter Damage to it. This attack is always a Crit and deals an additional +{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage. If Titus did not charge the targeted enemy this turn, he instead deals {[nrOfHits_2]}x {[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} Chain Damage to all adjacent enemies. When Titus gets revived or resurrected and Tactical Precision has already been used, then Tactical Precision can be used again in this battle.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Bolter">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Bolter Damage</style> and an additional <style="Stat_CritDamage">+{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage</style>, or <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Chain">{[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} Chain Damage</style>.

text.name: Fuelled by Fury
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> with all attacks for each time a friendly <style="Character">Character</style> has used an active ability this battle. The first time each turn that <style="Faction_Ultramarines">Titus</style> is defeated he cannot be <style="Overkill">Overkilled</style>. The first time each turn he defeats an enemy with an attack triggered by <style="FinalJustice">Final Vengeance</style> he is immediately revived with a maximum of <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> and is revived with <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style>.

text.name: Heavy Rail Rifle
text.currentLevelDescription:
Targets an enemy and fires the Heavy Rail Rifle at the start of <style="Faction_Tau">Tson'ji's</style> next turn. If targeting a unit, deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Piercing">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Piercing Damage</style>. This damage is reduced by <style="STAT">{[dmgPctReduction]}%</style> for each hex the target has traversed during its last turn, to a minimum of 0 damage. Any damage dealt to <style="Vehicle">Vehicles</style> and <style="Big_Target">Big Targets</style> is increased by <style="STAT">{[extraDmgPct]}%</style> each. If targeting <style="MoW">Machines of War</style>, increases the <style="Cooldown">cooldown</style> of the target's secondary ability by {[cooldownIncrease]} round and has a <style="STAT">{[chance]}%</style> chance to also increase the <style="Cooldown">cooldown</style> of the primary ability by {[cooldownIncrease_2]} round.

Initial <style="Cooldown">cooldown: {[initialCooldownTurns]} round</style>. 
Cost: <style="Resource_MachinesOfWarAmmo">{[munitionsCost]} munition</style>.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Piercing">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Piercing Damage</style> to units and has a <style="STAT">{[chance]}%</style> chance to increase the <style="Cooldown">cooldown</style> of the primary ability by {[cooldownIncrease_2]} round.

text.name: Twin Smart Missile System
text.currentLevelDescription:
Targets an enemy unit on the battlefield, then deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> to each enemy unit that has a <style="Debuff_Markerlight">Markerlight</style>. The target unit then receives a Markerlight for 2 rounds.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> to each enemy unit that has a Markerlight.

text.name: Mind Control
text.currentLevelDescription: Targets an enemy unit within {[range]} hexes that is adjacent to one or more friendly units. For this round and the next, that enemy unit deals <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReduction]} Damage</style>, takes <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style>, and becomes <style="Debuff_Taunted">Taunted</style> by the adjacent unit with the highest current <style="Stat_Health">Health</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: The target now deals <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReduction]} Damage</style> and takes <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style>.

text.name: Spiritual Leader
text.currentLevelDescription:
After moving, places a <style="Decoy">decoy</style> on an empty adjacent hex. Then, if there are 2 or more decoys adjacent to <style="Faction_Genestealers">Xybia</style>, summons a <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Genestealers">Neophyte Hybrid</style></style> on one adjacent decoy. If <style="Faction_Genestealers">Xybia</style> does not move, then this ability triggers at the end of her turn.

Neophyte Hybrid stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>
text.nextLevelDescription:
Neophyte Hybrid stats:

<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.currentLevelDescription:
Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage</style> to an adjacent enemy, then summons a <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Genestealers">Purestrain Genestealer</style></style> on each <style="Decoy">decoy</style> adjacent to <style="Faction_Genestealers">the Patermine</style>. The Purestrain Genestealers can immediately attack in <style="Stat_Melee">melee</style>, but cannot move this turn.

Purestrain Genestealer stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}
text.nextLevelDescription:
Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Psychic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Psychic Damage</style>

Purestrain Genestealer stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Cosmic Horror
text.currentLevelDescription: Whenever <style="Faction_Genestealers">the Patermine</style> defeats an enemy, it places a <style="Decoy">decoy</style> on the hex of that enemy. Other enemies surrounding the defeated unit have a <style="Stat_Chance">{[chance]}% chance</style> to be <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppressed</style> for 1 round, and have a <style="Stat_Chance">{[chance]}% chance</style> to trigger <style="Battle_Fatigue">Battle Fatigue</style> a second time, if they have it. When <style="Faction_Genestealers">the Patermine</style> moves onto a decoy, it <style="Healing">heals</style> itself for <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: The chance to trigger <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppression</style> and <style="Battle_Fatigue">Battle Fatigue</style> is now <style="Stat_Chance">{[chance]}% chance</style>. The amount healed is increased to <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style>.

text.name: Hypermorph
text.currentLevelDescription: Gains extra <style="Stat_Damage">Damage</style> equal to <style="STAT">{[healthPct]}%</style> of current <style="Stat_Health">Health</style>.

text.name: Aberrant Hypermorph
text.currentLevelDescription:
Summons an <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Genestealers">Aberrant Hypermorph</style></style> in a free adjacent hex. The Aberrant Hypermorph can immediately attack, but cannot move this turn.

Aberrant Hypermorph's stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>
text.nextLevelDescription:
Aberrant Hypermorph stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Twisted Science
text.currentLevelDescription: Units healed by Hollan, other than himself, are affected by Twisted Science until they are defeated. Hollan can heal other unaffected units even if they are at full Health. Affected units immediately gain {[hp]} Health and their maximum Health increases by the same amount. If they are a Genestealer Cults unit, they also deal +{[extraDmg]} Damage while affected. Affected units cannot gain the effects of Twisted Science again.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected units now gain <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style> and maximum <style="Stat_Health">Health</style>, and if they are a <style="Faction_Genestealers">Genestealer Cult</style> unit, they also deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Cult Demagogue
text.currentLevelDescription:
Targets an enemy unit within {[range]} hexes and places <style="Decoy">decoys</style> on up to <style="Stat">{[nrOfSummons]}</style> random free hexes within {[range_2]} hexes around the target. Then summons <style="Summon2"><style="Faction_Genestealers">Neophyte Hybrids</style></style> on half of all the friendly <style="Decoy">decoys</style> in that area and all <style="Faction_Genestealers">Neophyte Hybrids</style> in that area immediately take a turn.

Neophyte Hybrid stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp_2]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg_2]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor_2]} Armour</style>
text.nextLevelDescription:
Now places <style="Decoy">decoys</style> on up to <style="Stat">{[nrOfSummons]}</style> hexes.

Neophyte Hybrid stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp_2]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg_2]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor_2]} Armour</style>

text.name: Decoys and Misdirection
text.currentLevelDescription: When an enemy moves onto a friendly <style="Decoy">decoy</style>, it takes <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style>. When a friendly unit resurrects onto or moves onto a friendly <style="Decoy">decoy</style>, it deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> until the end of its turn, and if it is a <style="Faction_Genestealers">Genestealer Cults</style> unit, it also places a new <style="Decoy">decoy</style> in a free adjacent hex.
text.nextLevelDescription: Enemy units now take <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> and friendly units deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Heroic Fusillade
text.currentLevelDescription: Targets an enemy unit that has a free surrounding hex within movement range {[range]} of Judh or is already on a hex surrounding Judh. She then moves to the free hex and deals {[nrOfHits]}x {[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Projectile Damage to the target and all other enemies surrounding it. Crits deal an additional +{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage for each free hex surrounding the targeted enemy. When Judh is resurrected and Heroic Fusillade has already been used, then it can be used again in this battle.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Projectile">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Projectile Damage</style> and an additional <style="Stat_CritDamage">+{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage</style> for each free hex surrounding the targeted enemy.

text.name: Hypersensory Abilities
text.currentLevelDescription: The first time each enemy turn that <style="Faction_Genestealers">Judh</style> is attacked, she cannot fall below <style="Stat">{[hpPct]}%</style> of her current <style="Stat_Health">Health</style>. After the attack, she moves to a free adjacent hex and places a <style="Decoy">decoy</style> on the hex she moved from. Then, if she is within {[range]} hexes of the unit that attacked her, she deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Projectile">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Projectile Damage</style> to that unit.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now cannot fall below <style="Stat">{[hpPct]}%</style> of her current <style="Stat_Health">Health</style> and deals <style="DMG_Projectile">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Projectile Damage</style> to the attacking unit.

text.name: Entropy Cannons
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Energy">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Energy Damage</style>.

text.name: Plagueburst Mortar
text.nextLevelDescription: Enemies are now dealt <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Toxic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Toxic Damage</style>, and up to <style="Stat">{[nrOfTiles]}</style> hexes receive <style="Tile_Contamination">Contamination</style>.

text.name: Vengeance for the Omnissiah
text.currentLevelDescription: Whenever an adjacent friendly <style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style> is defeated, the <style="Faction_AdeptusMechanicus">Tech-Priest Enginseer</style> gains <style="Stat">{[effectLevel]}</style> level of <style="Buff_MachineVengeance">Machine Vengeance</style>.

text.name: Omnissiah's Blessing
text.currentLevelDescription: Whenever the <style="Faction_AdeptusMechanicus">Tech-Priest Enginseer</style> <style="Repairing">repairs</style> another unit, it transfers all levels of <style="Buff_MachineVengeance">Machine Vengeance</style> it has to the repaired unit.

text.name: Voltagheist Field
text.currentLevelDescription: If <style="Stat_Health">Health</style> is restored to this unit, the amount restored is reduced by <style="Stat">{[healthPct]}%</style> and it then scores <style="Stat_Hits">+{[extraHit]} hit</style> with <style="NormalAttack">normal attacks</style> until the end of its turn.

text.name: Electro-Shock
text.currentLevelDescription: When this unit performs a <style="NormalAttack">normal melee attack</style>, it also deals {[dmgPct]}% of its <style="Stat_Damage">Damage</style> to a random enemy adjacent to the target and all damaged enemies are <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppressed</style> for 1 round.

text.name: Explosive Presents
text.currentLevelDescription:
Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> to an enemy unit or friendly <style="Faction_Orks">Grot</style> within range {[range]} and all units adjacent to the target, except <style="Faction_Orks">Da Red Gobbo</style> itself. This ability can be used multiple times per battle but has a <style="Cooldown">cooldown of {[cooldownTurns]} rounds</style>. This cooldown is reduced by {[cooldownReduction]} round whenever a Grot is defeated.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}

text.name: Da Revolushun!
text.currentLevelDescription:
Whenever an adjacent unit is defeated, <style="Faction_Orks">Da Red Gobbo</style> summons a <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Orks">Grot</style></style> in its hex, unless the defeated unit was a Grot. The summoned Grot can immediately attack an adjacent enemy. Whenever a friendly Grot is defeated anywhere on the battlefield, it explodes and deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> to all adjacent Grots and all adjacent enemies.

Grot’s stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}

text.name: Bounce
text.currentLevelDescription: After being attacked, has a <style="STAT">{[chance]}%</style> chance to be <style="Displacement">thrown</style> to a new position within 2 hexes. If that hex is occupied, the <style="Faction_Orks">Large Squig</style> deals <style="DMG_Physical">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Physical Damage</style> to the unit on that hex and <style="Displacement">pushes</style> it to a random free adjacent hex. This ability can also trigger if the <style="Faction_Orks">Large Squig</style> is killed by an attack, unless <style="Overkill">Overkilled</style>.

text.name: Priority Reclamation
text.currentLevelDescription: While there is an <style="Faction_AdeptusMechanicus">Archeotec Crate</style> on the battlefield, <style="Faction_AdeptusMechanicus">Actus</style> receives <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style>, but loses <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style> each time an enemy destroys an Archeotec Crate. At the end of his turn, if Actus is adjacent to an Archeotec Crate, he removes one Archeotec Crate and all friendly <style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style> units gain <style="Stat">{[effectLevel]}</style> levels of <style="Buff_MachineVengeance">Machine Vengeance</style>.

text.name: Rad-Zone Corps
text.currentLevelDescription:
At the beginning of <style="Faction_AdeptusMechanicus">Tan Gi'Da's</style> turn, he deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Toxic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Toxic Damage</style> to each enemy that has their <style="Stat_Armor">Armour</style> reduced. At the end of his turn, he summons <style="Stat">{[nrOfSummons]}</style> <style="Summon"><style="Faction_AdeptusMechanicus">Skitarii Vanguard</style></style> at the top of the map and <style="Tile_Contamination">Contaminates</style> one row of hexes on the battlefield.

Skitarii Vanguard stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Invocation of Machine Vengeance
text.currentLevelDescription:
Summons <style="Stat">{[nrOfSummons]}</style> <style="Summon"><style="Faction_AdeptusMechanicus">Tech-Priest Enginseers</style></style> at the bottom of the map. Then adds <style="Stat">{[effectLevel]}</style> level of <style="Buff_MachineVengeance">Machine Vengeance</style> to all friendly <style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style> units on the battlefield.

Tech-Priest Enginseer stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Arc Scourge
text.currentLevelDescription: Attacks an enemy unit within {[range]} hexes. Up to {[maxAdjacentTargets]} additional units adjacent to each other are also hit, including friendly units. Enemy units that are hit receive {[nrOfHits]}x {[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Molecular Damage and if they are Mechanical, they are also Stunned for 1 round. For each mechanical unit hit, Belisarius Cawl gains {[effectLevel]} level of Machine Vengeance. After using Arc Scourge, Belisarius Cawl can immediately use another action.

text.name: Solar Atomizer
text.currentLevelDescription: Transfers all levels of <style="Buff_MachineVengeance">Machine Vengeance</style> from other friendly <style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style> units to <style="Faction_AdeptusMechanicus">Belisarius Cawl</style>. Additionally <style="Faction_AdeptusMechanicus">Belisarius Cawl</style> faces in one of 6 directions and marks all hexes in a straight line 2 hexes wide. At the beginning of his next turn, deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Melta">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Melta Damage</style> to all enemies on affected hexes.

text.name: Self-Repair Mechanism
text.currentLevelDescription: Beginning with the end of round <style="Stat">{[nrOfRounds]}</style>, at the end of each of his turns, <style="Faction_AdeptusMechanicus">Belisarius Cawl</style> <style="Repairing">repairs</style> himself for <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToRepair]} Health</style> for each level of <style="Buff_MachineVengeance">Machine Vengeance</style> he has.

text.name: Self-Repair Mechanism
text.currentLevelDescription: Beginning with the end of round <style="Stat">{[nrOfRounds]}</style>, at the end of each of his turns, <style="Faction_AdeptusMechanicus">Belisarius Cawl</style> gains <style="Stat_Armor">+ {[extraArmor]} Armour</style> for each level of <style="Buff_MachineVengeance">Machine Vengeance</style> he has.

text.name: Shroud Psalm
text.currentLevelDescription: Up to {[nrOfTargets]} other friendly units gain {[effectLevel]} levels of Machine Vengeance and are affected by Shroud Psalm until the start of their next turn. Affected units have +{[extraArmor]} Armour and normal attacks against them score -{[hitsReduction]} hits, to a minimum of 1.

text.name: Pre-Calibrated Purge Solution
text.currentLevelDescription: If <style="Faction_AdeptusMechanicus">Belisarius Cawl</style> has at least <style="Stat">{[effectLevel]}</style> levels of <style="Buff_MachineVengeance">Machine Vengeance</style> at the start of his turn, he deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Toxic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Toxic Damage</style> to all enemies on the battlefield.

text.name: Blight Grenades
text.currentLevelDescription:
Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Toxic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Toxic Damage</style> to an enemy unit within range {[range]} that is not on a hex with <style="Tile_Contamination">Contamination</style>, and up to two enemy units behind the target. This ability benefits from <style="Indirect_Fire">Indirect Fire</style>.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}

text.name: Cloud Of Flies
text.currentLevelDescription: Receives <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style> while on a hex with <style="Tile_Contamination">Contamination</style>. If this unit is attacked while it is not on a hex with <style="Tile_Contamination">Contamination</style>, it has a {[chance]}% chance to contaminate the hex it is standing on.

text.name: Vexilla Magnifica
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Physical">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Physical Damage</style> to an adjacent enemy target and an additional adjacent enemy unit. Both enemies are <style="Debuff_Stunned">Stunned</style> for 1 round, and <style="Faction_Custodes">Aesoth</style> receives <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style> for {[nrOfRounds]} round. This ability can be used multiple times per battle but has a <style="Cooldown">cooldown of {[cooldownTurns]} rounds.</style>
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Physical">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Physical Damage</style> and receives <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style>.

text.name: Stand Vigil
text.currentLevelDescription: Friendly surrounding units have +{[extraArmor]} Armour and deal +{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage with attacks that are not normal attacks. If a friendly Adeptus Custodes uses an Active Ability, Stand Vigil affects all other friendly units within {[range]} hexes for 1 round.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected units now have <style="Stat_Armor">+{[extraArmor]} Armour</style> and deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style> with non-normal attacks.

text.name: Moment Shackle
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_Custodes">Trajann</style> <style="Healing">heals</style> himself for <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal]} Health</style>. For {[nrOfRounds]} round, <style="Faction_Custodes">Trajann</style> has <style="Stat_Chance">+{[blockChance]}% Block chance</style> and blocks an additional <style="Stat_Block">+{[blockDmg]} Damage</style>. During that round, he also deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Bolter">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Bolter Damage</style> to each enemy unit that moves from a hex adjacent to him.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now heals himself for <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal]} Health</style>. For {[nrOfRounds]} round, <style="Faction_Custodes">Trajann</style> now has <style="Stat_Chance">+{[blockChance]}% Block chance</style>, blocks an additional <style="Stat_Block">+{[blockDmg]} Damage</style> and deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Bolter">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Bolter Damage</style>.

text.name: Legendary Commander
text.currentLevelDescription: Enemies receive <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> if they are adjacent to any friendly unit that has used an active ability this turn. If the affected enemies are also adjacent to <style="Faction_Custodes">Trajann</style>, friendly <style="Character">Characters</style> score <style="STAT">{[nrOfHits]}</style> additional <style="Stat_Hits">hits</style> against them with their first attack that is not a <style="NormalAttack">normal attack</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Enemies now receive <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>, and friendly <style="Character">Characters</style> score <style="STAT">{[nrOfHits]}</style> additional <style="Stat_Hits">hits</style>.

text.name: Forward Observers
text.currentLevelDescription: Targets an enemy unit within range {[range]} that does not have a <style="Debuff_Markerlight">Markerlight</style>. The target receives a <style="Debuff_Markerlight">Markerlight</style> for {[nrOfRounds]} rounds. The <style="Faction_Tau">Stealth Battlesuit</style> then receives <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgPctReduction]}% Damage</style> from ranged attacks for {[nrOfRounds_2]} round.

text.name: Wall of Mirrors
text.currentLevelDescription: If the <style="Faction_Tau">Stealth Battlesuit</style> has not moved, it disappears from its current hex and reappears on a free hex on the battlefield from which it can perform a <style="NormalAttack">normal ranged attack</style> against an enemy that has a <style="Debuff_Markerlight">Markerlight</style>. This attack has <style="Piercing_Ratio">+{[extraPierce]}% Pierce Ratio</style>.

text.name: Thrice-Blessed Conflagration
text.currentLevelDescription:
Targets a friendly unit on the battlefield. For <style="STAT">{[nrOfRounds]}</style> rounds, it deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style> with ranged attacks against enemies on <style="Effect_Fire">Fire</style> hexes. Affected <style="Faction_Sisterhood">Adepta Sororitas</style> units deal additional damage with all attacks instead. The <style="Faction_Sisterhood">Exorcist</style> then deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Flame">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Flame Damage</style> to all enemies in the longest uninterrupted straight line originating from the targeted friendly unit.

Initial <style="Cooldown">cooldown: {[initialCooldownTurns]} round</style>. 
Cost: <style="Resource_MachinesOfWarAmmo">{[munitionsCost]} munition</style>.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}
text.nextLevelDescription: Units now deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style> for <style="STAT">{[nrOfRounds]}</style> rounds and the <style="Faction_Sisterhood">Exorcist </style> now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Flame">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Flame Damage</style>.

text.name: Devastating Refrain
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> and has <style="STAT">{[chance]}%</style> chance to increase the <style="Stat_Chance">Crit Chance</style> and <style="Stat_CritDamage">Crit Damage</style> for friendly units with <style="Act_Of_Faith">Act of Faith</style>.

text.name: Calibanite Greatsword
text.currentLevelDescription: Forcas can switch between two stances. Strike Stance: At the end of his turn, Forcas starts Overwatching, even if he attacked in his turn. When defeating a unit while Overwatching, he remains in Overwatch, retaining {[nrOfHits]} fewer hits compared to the previous attack. Sweep Stance: Forcas' normal attacks also deal {[nrOfHits_2]}x {[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage to each enemy adjacent to both Forcas and the initial target. This ability can be used once per turn; each use switches the active Stance and does not end Forcas' turn. Only the first use of this ability in each battle counts as using an active ability.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now retains <style="STAT">{[nrOfHits]}</style> fewer <style="Stat_Hits">hits</style> when defeating an enemy while <style="Buff_Overwatching">Overwatching</style> in Strike Stance. Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style> to enemies adjacent to both him and the initial target while in Sweep Stance.

text.name: Enmity for the Unworthy
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Forcas</style> deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style> for each adjacent unit and additionally <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> for each adjacent friendly <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Dark Angel</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style> for each adjacent unit and additionally <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> for each adjacent friendly <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Dark Angel</style>.

text.name: Talons Of The Emperor
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style> to an adjacent enemy unit. This attack deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> for each time a friendly <style="Character">Character</style> has used an active ability this battle. If the target is a <style="Psyker">Psyker</style> or <style="Faction_Custodes">Atlacoya</style> is adjacent to a friendly <style="Faction_Custodes">Adeptus Custodes</style>, this attack deals <style="DMG_Direct">Direct Damage</style> instead.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style> and <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> for each time a friendly <style="Character">character</style> has used an active ability this battle.

text.name: Daughter Of The Abyss
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_Custodes">Atlacoya</style> takes <style="DMG_Psychic">-{[dmgReduction]} Psychic Damage</style>. <style="DMG_Psychic">Psychic Damage</style> dealt to other friendly units within {[range]} hexes of Atlacoya is reduced by <style="Stat">{[dmgReductionPct]}%</style>. Enemy <style="Psyker">Psykers</style> within {[range]} hexes receive <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now takes <style="DMG_Psychic">-{[dmgReduction]} Psychic Damage</style> and <style="DMG_Psychic">Psychic Damage</style> dealt to other friendly units within {[range]} hexes is now reduced by <style="Stat">{[dmgReductionPct]}%</style>. Enemy <style="Psyker">Psykers</style> now receive <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style>.

text.name: Martial Inspiration
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals {[nrOfHits]}x {[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Eviscerating Damage to an adjacent enemy. This attack and attacks from Legacy of Combat this turn deal +{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage for each turn in which Kariyan performed an attack this battle. This ability can be used multiple times per battle but has a cooldown of {[cooldownTurns]} rounds.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Eviscerate">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Eviscerating Damage</style> and damage is now increased by <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style> for each turn in which <style="Faction_Custodes">Kariyan</style> performed an attack this battle.

text.name: Legacy Of Combat
text.currentLevelDescription: After performing his first attack each turn, <style="Faction_Custodes">Kariyan</style> performs an additional attack. If he is adjacent to an enemy <style="Big_Target">Big Target</style>, this attack deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Piercing">{[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} Piercing Damage</style> to it. If there is no adjacent enemy <style="Big_Target">Big Target</style>, <style="Faction_Custodes">Kariyan</style> deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style> to each adjacent enemy instead.
text.nextLevelDescription: The attack now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Piercing">{[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} Piercing Damage</style> to an adjacent enemy <style="Big_Target">Big Target</style>, or <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style> to each adjacent enemy.

text.name: Lash of Torment
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals<style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Eviscerate">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Eviscerating Damage</style> to an enemy unit within range {[range]}. If the target is not already adjacent to <style="Faction_EmperorsChildren">Lucius</style>, it is then <style="Displacement">pulled</style> 1 hex towards him if possible, and can be pulled over any elevation but not through impassable terrain. If the target is adjacent to Lucius after the attack, it is also <style="Debuff_Taunted">Taunted</style> by him for <style="STAT">{[nrOfRounds]}</style> rounds.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Eviscerate">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Eviscerating Damage</style> and the target is <style="Debuff_Taunted">Taunted</style> for <style="STAT">{[nrOfRounds]}</style> rounds.

text.name: Armour of Shrieking Souls
text.currentLevelDescription: If Lucius is defeated by an enemy unit, that enemy becomes Elated. At the beginning of each of its turns, the affected unit loses {[minHp]}-{[maxHp]} Health and when it is defeated or leaves the battlefield, Lucius resurrects on the last hex the enemy was on with a maximum of {[hp]} Health.
text.nextLevelDescription: Elated unit now loses {[minHp]}-{[maxHp]} Health and Lucius now resurrects with {[hp]} Health.

text.name: Excruciating Frequencies
text.currentLevelDescription: Affects {[nrOfTiles]} hexes in a straight line in one of 6 directions. This attack has <style="Stat">+{[extraCritChance]}% Crit Chance</style> for each unit on affected hexes and deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> to each enemy on affected hexes. Enemies hit are also <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppressed</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now has <style="Stat">+{[extraCritChance]}% Crit Chance</style> and deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style>.

text.name: Terrifying Crescendo
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_EmperorsChildren">Shiron</style>'s ranged attacks deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> for each time he <style="Overkill">Overkilled</style> or would have <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppressed</style> an enemy unit, up to a maximum of {[buffMaxLevel]} times.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Euphoric Strikes
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals {[nrOfHits]}x {[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage to an adjacent enemy. The next attack against that enemy this turn has +{[extraCritChance]}% Crit Chance. Using Euphoric Strikes does not end Laviscus' turn.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style> and the next attack has <style="Stat">+{[extraCritChance]}% Crit Chance</style>.

text.name: Refusal to be Outdone
text.currentLevelDescription: Friendly characters attacking enemies adjacent to Laviscus increase his Outrage equal to the highest damage dealt by any of their non-psychic hits this turn. Laviscus' Damage stat is increased by {[extraDmgPct]}% of his Outrage and his normal attacks deal an additional +{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage for each friendly Chaos character that increased his Outrage this turn. At the end of his turn or after Laviscus performs a normal attack, his Outrage resets.
text.nextLevelDescription: Damage stat is now increased by {[extraDmgPct]}% of his Outrage and his normal attacks deal an additional +{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage for each friendly Chaos character that increased his Outrage this turn.

text.name: Doom Siren
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals {[nrOfHits]}x {[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Direct Damage to an adjacent enemy and up to {[nrOfUnits]} other random enemies adjacent to the target. For the rest of the battle, Adamatar's normal attacks score an additional hit for each enemy Overkilled by Doom Siren.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Direct">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Direct Damage</style>.

text.name: Obsessive Annunciation
text.currentLevelDescription: All enemy units adjacent to <style="Faction_EmperorsChildren">Adamatar</style> take <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> from ranged attacks. If an enemy was <style="Overkill">Overkilled</style> this turn, enemies adjacent to Adamatar take <style="Stat_CritDamage">+{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage</style> from all attacks by friendly <style="Aliance_Chaos">Chaos</style> units.
text.nextLevelDescription: Enemies now take <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> and <style="Stat_CritDamage">+{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage</style>.

text.name: Daemonic Patrons
text.currentLevelDescription: Taunts an adjacent enemy, and Hascule gets watched until the end of his next turn. While being watched, Hascule deals +{[extraDmg]} Damage and takes -{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage for each adjacent Taunted enemy. If he defeats an adjacent Taunted enemy while being watched, he can use this ability again. If he does not, he loses {[hpPct]}% of his current Health.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals +{[extraDmg]} Damage and takes -{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage for each adjacent Taunted enemy while being watched. Now loses {[hpPct]}% of his current Health when he does not defeat a Taunted enemy when being watched.

text.name: Ecstatic Slaughter
text.currentLevelDescription: When <style="Faction_EmperorsChildren">Hascule</style> becomes <style="ThrillSeekers">Thrilled</style> or every time an enemy unit adjacent to him is <style="Overkill">Overkilled</style>, Hascule deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Eviscerate">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Eviscerating Damage</style> to an adjacent enemy unit. If the enemy survives, it is <style="Debuff_Taunted">Taunted</style> for {[nrOfRounds]} round.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Eviscerate">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Eviscerating Damage</style>.

text.name: Nova Boost
text.currentLevelDescription: Marks all hexes adjacent to the <style="Faction_Tau">Riptide</style>. <style="Tile_Trench">Trenches</style> cannot be marked. At the beginning of its next turn, the Riptide deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Particle">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Particle Damage</style> to each enemy on marked hexes and then flies to a new location on the battlefield.

text.name: Nova Charge
text.currentLevelDescription: Faces in one of 6 directions and marks all hexes in a 3-tile wide line, originating from the <style="Faction_Tau">Riptide</style> and additionally marks {[nrOfTargets]} hexes that are not on this line. <style="Tile_Trench">Trenches</style> cannot be marked. At the beginning of the Riptide's next turn, it deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Particle">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Particle Damage</style> to all enemies on the hexes marked by the line, and <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} Blast Damage</style> to all enemies on the other marked hexes.

text.name: Nova Shield
text.currentLevelDescription: The <style="Faction_Tau">Riptide</style> gains a <style="Buff_Shield">Shield</style> with <style="Stat_Health">{[shieldHp]} Health</style> and receives <style="Stat_Chance">+{[blockChance]}% Block chance</style> for {[nrOfRounds]} round. It then marks a hex on the battlefield and all hexes adjacent to it. <style="Tile_Trench">Trenches</style> cannot be marked. At the beginning of its next turn, the Riptide deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Particle">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Particle Damage</style> to all enemies on marked hexes.

text.name: Multi-Target
text.currentLevelDescription: All enemy units that did not move during their turn receive a <style="Debuff_Markerlight">Markerlight</style>.
