text.name: Target Lock
text.currentLevelDescription: At the beginning of the <style="Faction_Tau">Riptide</style>'s turn, it deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style> to all enemy units with a <style="Debuff_Markerlight">Markerlight</style>.

text.name: A Tempting Trap
text.currentLevelDescription:
<style="Faction_Tau">Sho'Syl</style> receives <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style> from all attacks, but loses <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style> each time he is damaged by a melee attack. At the start of his third turn, he summons <style="STAT">{[nrOfSummons]}</style> <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Tau">Stealth Battlesuits</style></style> plus an additional Battlesuit for each enemy unit on the battlefield. The summoned units immediately take a turn.

Stealth Battlesuit stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Pinpoint Counter Offensive
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_Tau">Re'vas</style> can use her active ability {[maxNrOfActivations]} times per Battle. Additionally, she takes <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style> from all attacks, but loses <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style> each time she is attacked by a unit with either the <style="Infiltrate">Infiltrate</style> or <style="Terminator_Armor">Terminator Armour</style> traits, or by a unit that has <style="Buff_Infiltrate">Infiltrate</style> from an ability.

text.name: Mischief Makers
text.currentLevelDescription: Targets of the <style="Faction_DeathGuard">Nurglings'</style> <style="NormalAttack">normal attacks</style> cannot be revived, <style="Healing">healed</style>, <style="Repairing">repaired</style>, or otherwise restore {[S/Health]} for {[nrOfRounds]} round. These attacks additionally have a <style="Stat_Chance">{[chance]}% chance</style> to <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppress</style> the target for {[nrOfRounds]} round.

text.name: Embodied Prophecy
text.currentLevelDescription: During its first {[nrOfRounds]} rounds, the <style="Faction_Sisterhood">Zephyrim</style> deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>, blocks an additional <style="Stat_Block">+{[blockDmg]} Damage</style> and their <style="Stat_Block">Block</style> <style="Stat_Chance">chance</style> is increased by <style="Stat">+{[blockChance]}%</style>.

text.name: Hunter's Instincts
text.currentLevelDescription: Gains <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> and takes <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReduction]} Damage</style> while on a hex with <style="Tile_Grass">Tall Grass</style>.

text.name: Kardiocore Galvanus
text.currentLevelDescription: The relic bearer deals <style="Stat_CritDamage">+{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage</style> for each friendly adjacent <style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style> unit.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_CritDamage">+{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage</style>.

text.name: Phoenix Gem
text.currentLevelDescription: The first time each battle that <style="Faction_Aeldari">Aethana</style> is defeated, she is instead revived with a maximum of <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style> remaining, even if <style="Overkill">Overkilled</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now revives with <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style>.

text.name: Relic of Lost Cadia
text.currentLevelDescription: Friendly surrounding <style="Aliance_Imperial">Imperial</style> <style="Summon">Summons</style> have <style="FinalJustice">Final Vengeance</style>. When the relic bearer is defeated, summons a <style="Summon"><style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Cadian Guardsman</style></style> in its hex with <style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>, <style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style> and <style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription:
<style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Cadian Guardsman</style> stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Book of Fate
text.currentLevelDescription: After the relic bearer performs a <style="NormalAttack">normal attack</style>, a friendly adjacent <style="Summon">Summon</style> performs a normal attack against an enemy in range, if possible. If the summon is a <style="Daemon">Daemon</style>, it deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> with this attack.
text.nextLevelDescription: Daemons now deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> with this attack.

text.name: Talisman of Rage
text.currentLevelDescription: Each time the relic bearer defeats an enemy with a melee attack, it counts twice for <style="BlessingsOfKhorne">Blessings Of Khorne</style>. The relic bearer takes <style="Stat_CritDamage">-{[critDmgReduction]} Crit Damage</style> for each level of <style="BlessingsOfKhorne">Blessings Of Khorne</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now takes <style="Stat_CritDamage">-{[critDmgReduction]} Crit Damage</style>.

text.name: Nether-Realm Casket
text.currentLevelDescription: The relic bearer takes <style="Stat_CritDamage">-{[critDmgReduction]} Crit Damage</style> for each adjacent friendly <style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style> unit and <style="Regenerate">regenerates</style> an additional  <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal]} Health</style> from <style="Living_Metal">Living Metal</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now takes <style="Stat_CritDamage">-{[critDmgReduction]} Crit Damage</style> and <style="Regenerate">regenerates</style> <style="Stat_Health">+{[hpToHeal]} Health</style>.

text.name: Intoxicating Elixir
text.currentLevelDescription: The relic bearer deals <style="Stat_CritDamage">+{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage</style> for each unit within range {[range]} that is <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppressed</style>, <style="Debuff_Stunned">Stunned</style>, <style="Debuff_Taunted">Taunted</style>, or <style="ThrillSeekers">Thrilled</style>, up to a maximum of {[nrOfUnits]} times. This bonus is doubled if the relic bearer is at or below <style="Stat_Health">{[healthPct]}% Health</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_CritDamage">+{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage</style>.

text.name: Amulet of the Voidwyrm
text.currentLevelDescription: The relic bearer takes <style="Stat_CritDamage">-{[critDmgReduction]} Crit Damage</style> for each friendly adjacent <style="Summon">Summon</style> or <style="Decoy">Decoy</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now takes <style="Stat_CritDamage">-{[critDmgReduction]} Crit Damage</style>.

text.name: Orbs of Decay
text.currentLevelDescription: The relic bearer's <style="NormalAttack">normal attacks</style> deal an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Toxic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Toxic Damage</style> to enemy units that have their <style="Stat_Armor">Armour</style> reduced by {[armorReductionPct]}% or more and are also on or adjacent to the target's hex. Additionally, the target's hex is <style="Tile_Contamination">Contaminated</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Toxic">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Toxic Damage</style>.

text.name: Relic Power Fist
text.currentLevelDescription: The relic bearer's attacks that deal <style="DMG_Power">Power Damage</style> have a <style="Stat_Chance">{[chance]}% chance</style> to <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppress</style> and a <style="Stat_Chance">{[chance_2]}% chance</style> to <style="Debuff_Stunned">Stun</style> enemies targeted by them. These chances are doubled if the attack is an active ability.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now has a <style="Stat_Chance">{[chance]}% chance</style> to <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppress</style> and a <style="Stat_Chance">{[chance_2]}% chance</style> to <style="Debuff_Stunned">Stun</style>.

text.name: Relic Bolt Pistol
text.currentLevelDescription: The relic bearer gains <style="Piercing_Ratio">+{[extraPierceRatio]}% pierce ratio</style> with melee attacks and deals <style="Stat_CritDamage">+{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage</style> with ranged attacks. These bonuses are doubled against <style="Aliance_Chaos">Chaos</style> or <style="Aliance_Xenos">Xenos</style> enemies.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now gains <style="Piercing_Ratio">+{[extraPierceRatio]}% pierce ratio</style> and deals <style="Stat_CritDamage">+{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage</style>.

text.name: Supa-Cybork Body
text.currentLevelDescription: The relic bearer can be <style="Healing">healed</style> as well as <style="Repairing">repaired</style> and additionally takes <style="Stat_CritDamage">-{[critDmgReduction]} Crit Damage</style> for each adjacent enemy unit.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now takes <style="Stat_CritDamage">-{[critDmgReduction]} Crit Damage</style>.

text.name: Maw-Claws of Thyrax
text.currentLevelDescription: The relic bearer deals <style="Stat_CritDamage">+{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage</style> for each adjacent <style="Summon">Summon</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_CritDamage">+{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage</style>.

text.name: Daemonflesh Plate
text.currentLevelDescription: Each time the relic bearer attacks, it gains <style="Stat_Armor">+{[extraArmor]} Armour</style>. After attacking <style="STAT">{[nrOfAttacks]}</style> times, this bonus is reset and the relic bearer can use its active ability again.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now gains <style="Stat_Armor">+{[extraArmor]} Armour</style> and resets after attacking <style="STAT">{[nrOfAttacks]}</style> times.

text.name: Sabre of Sacrifice
text.currentLevelDescription: When <style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Dreir</style> or <style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Death Riders</style> adjacent to Dreir are <style="Charging">charging</style>, their attacks <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppress</style> their targets for 1 round. After charging and until the start of their next turn, they additionally have <style="Stat_Armor">+{[extraArmor]} Armour</style> for each friendly unit that has been defeated this battle.
text.nextLevelDescription: They now have <style="Stat_Armor">+{[extraArmor]} Armour</style>.

text.name: Vitarus
text.currentLevelDescription: The hexes of each enemy hit by Mephiston's normal melee attack or by Fury of the Ancients are set on Fire. If these attacks hit enemies on hexes with Fire, they deal +{[extraDmg]} Damage and extinguish the Fire.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected attacks now deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>.

text.name: The Ardent Blade
text.currentLevelDescription: The first time each turn that <style="Faction_Sisterhood">Celestine</style> defeats an enemy unit, she resurrects one of her <style="Faction_Sisterhood">Geminae Superia</style> with <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style> in a free adjacent hex. If they cannot be resurrected, then one of them within {[range]} hexes takes an action instead.
text.nextLevelDescription: <style="Faction_Sisterhood">Geminae Superia</style> is now resurrected with <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style>.

text.name: DW-02 Advanced Burst Cannon
text.currentLevelDescription: Each time <style="Faction_Tau">Re'vas</style> attacks, she gains <style="Piercing_Ratio">+{[extraPierceRatio]}% pierce ratio</style>. After attacking <style="STAT">{[nrOfAttacks]}</style> times, this bonus is reset, and Re'vas can use her active ability again.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now gains <style="Piercing_Ratio">+{[extraPierceRatio]}% pierce ratio</style> and bonus is reset after <style="STAT">{[nrOfAttacks]}</style> attacks.

text.name: Talon of Horus
text.currentLevelDescription: When <style="Faction_BlackLegion">Abaddon</style> performs a <style="NormalAttack">normal melee attack</style>, he also deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style> to all enemies adjacent to both the target of the attack and to Abaddon.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style>.

text.name: Maugetar
text.currentLevelDescription: During his turn, if <style="Faction_Aeldari">Maugan Ra</style> has not moved, he can move after attacking and his attacks that contain a <style="Stat_CritDamage">Crit</style> deal an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Direct">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Direct Damage</style>. When <style="Buff_Overwatching">Overwatching</style>, <style="Stat_CritDamage">Crits</style> deal this additional <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style> if he has not moved in his last turn.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Direct">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Direct Damage</style>.

text.name: Paragon Spear
text.currentLevelDescription: All of <style="Faction_Custodes">Tyrith's</style> hits that are <style="Stat_CritDamage">Crits</style> deal the maximum possible <style="Stat_Damage">Damage</style>. At the beginning of Tyrith's turn, she attacks a random enemy within range {[range]} and deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Bolter">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Bolter Damage</style> to it. If there is an enemy adjacent to her, this range is reduced to 1.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Bolter">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Bolter Damage</style>.

text.name: Norn Crown
text.currentLevelDescription: The maximum level of <style="Debuff_Neuroparasite">Neuroparasite</style> is increased by {[effectLevel]}. Other friendly <style="Psyker">Psykers</style> within <style="Synapse">Synapse</style> range and friendly <style="Summon">Summons</style> within <style="Synapse">Synapse</style> range deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> to enemies that are affected by <style="Debuff_Neuroparasite">Neuroparasite</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected units now deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Dawn Blade
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_Tau">Commander Farsight's</style> melee attacks deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> for each time another friendly <style="Character">Character</style> within {[range]} hexes has performed a ranged attack this turn. When Commander Farsight kills an enemy unit with a melee attack, he <style="Repairing">repairs</style> himself for <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal]} Health</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> and repairs <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal]} Health</style>.

text.name: Wyrdmaker's Helm
text.currentLevelDescription: During his turn, each time <style="Faction_SpaceWolves">Baldr</style> or an adjacent friendly unit gets <style="Healing">healed</style> for the first time this turn, Baldr immediately performs a <style="NormalAttack">normal melee attack</style>. These attacks deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> and add <style="Effect_Ice">Ice</style> to the target's hex.
text.nextLevelDescription: Attacks now deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Blade of the Ancestors
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_LeaguesOfVotann">Ûthar</style> gains <style="Stat">+{[extraCritChance]}% Crit Chance</style> and deals <style="Stat_CritDamage">+{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage</style> each time a friendly <style="Character">character</style> dies or kills an enemy unit. Once Ûthar crits, this bonus resets.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now gains <style="Stat">+{[extraCritChance]}% Crit Chance</style> and deals <style="Stat_CritDamage">+{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage</style>.

text.name: Vôlumm's Master Artifice
text.currentLevelDescription: After <style="Faction_LeaguesOfVotann">Vynn</style> or friendly <style="Faction_LeaguesOfVotann">E-COGs</style> have performed <style="Stat">+{[nrOfRepairs]}</style> <style="Repairing">repairs</style>, Vynn <style="Healing">heals</style> for <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal]} Health</style> and can use his active ability again.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now <style="Healing">heals</style> for <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal]} Health</style> after <style="Stat">+{[nrOfRepairs]}</style> <style="Repairing">repairs</style>.

text.name: Monster Slayer of Caliban
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Forcas</style> deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> to <style="Big_Target">Big Targets</style> and <style="Vehicle">Vehicles</style>. He also has an added <style="Stat_Chance">{[blockChance]}% chance</style> to <style="Stat_Block">Block</style> <style="Stat_Damage">{[blockDmg]} Damage</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> and has a <style="Stat_Chance">{[blockChance]}% chance</style> to <style="Stat_Block">Block</style> <style="Stat_Damage">{[blockDmg]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Lakrimae
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_DeathGuard">Typhus'</style> <style="NormalAttack">normal melee attacks</style> add <style="Tile_Contamination">Contamination</style> to the target's hex. During his turn, when a non-mechanical enemy unit within Typhus' <style="ContagionsOfNurgle">Contagion</style> aura is killed, he summons a <style="Summon"><style="Faction_DeathGuard">Poxwalker</style></style> in the hex of the defeated unit, as long as there are less than {[nrOfUnits]} friendly Poxwalkers on the battlefield. The Poxwalkers have <style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style> and <style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription:
Poxwalker’s stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>

text.name: Headwoppa's Killchoppa
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_Orks">Boss Gulgortz</style> and all friendly <style="Faction_Orks">Ork Boyz</style> deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> with melee attacks for each enemy unit that Boss Gulgortz has defeated in this battle.
text.nextLevelDescription: They now deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Chalice of Baal
text.currentLevelDescription: The first time each turn that any unit adjacent to <style="Faction_BloodAngels">Nicodemus</style> dies, he <style="Healing">heals</style> himself and all friendly adjacent units for <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style>. All affected units deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> with <style="NormalAttack">normal melee attacks</style> until the end of this turn.
text.nextLevelDescription: Units are now <style="Healing">healed</style> for <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style> and deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style>.

text.name: Blighted Land
text.currentLevelDescription: Friendly <style="Rarity_Mythic">Mythic</style> <style="Character">characters</style> deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style> while on a <style="Tile_Contamination">Contaminated</style> hex.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected characters now deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style>.

text.name: Contemptuous Disregard
text.currentLevelDescription: Friendly <style="Rarity_Mythic">Mythic</style> <style="Character">characters</style> take <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style> while on a hex with a <style="HexEffect">hex effect</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected characters now take <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style>.

text.name: Wisdom of the Ancients
text.currentLevelDescription: Friendly <style="Rarity_Mythic">Mythic</style> <style="Character">characters</style> take <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style> if they are adjacent to <style="Faction_Ultramarines">Galatian</style> or a friendly Mythic character.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected characters now take <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style>.

text.name: Shield of Faith
text.currentLevelDescription: When a friendly <style="Rarity_Mythic">Mythic</style> <style="Character">character</style> <style="Stat_CritDamage">Crits</style> or attacks an enemy that is on a hex with <style="Effect_Fire">Fire</style>, it gains a <style="Buff_Shield">Shield</style> until the start of its next turn, unless it already has a shield. The shield's <style="Stat_Health">Health</style> is <style="STAT">{[shieldPct]}%</style> of the affected character's maximum <style="Stat_Health">Health</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: The shield's <style="Stat_Health">Health</style> is now <style="STAT">{[shieldPct]}%</style> of the affected character's maximum <style="Stat_Health">Health</style>.

text.name: On my Position!
text.currentLevelDescription: Enemies that are adjacent to a friendly <style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Cadian Guardsman</style> or a friendly <style="Rarity_Mythic">Mythic</style> <style="Character">character</style> take <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style> from ranged attacks by mythic characters.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected enemies now take <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style>.

text.name: More Gitz Over 'Ere!
text.currentLevelDescription: Enemies that are adjacent to a friendly <style="Faction_Orks">Squig</style> or adjacent to two or more friendly <style="Rarity_Mythic">Mythic</style> <style="Character">characters</style> take <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style> from <style="NormalAttack">normal melee attacks</style> by <style="Rarity_Mythic">Mythic</style> characters.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected enemies now take <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style>.

text.name: Electrochaff Backups
text.currentLevelDescription: Enemy units that have a <style="Debuff_Markerlight">Markerlight</style> or have been damaged by a ranged attack deal <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style> to <style="Rarity_Mythic">Mythic</style> <style="Character">characters</style> for {[nrOfRounds]} round.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected enemies now deal <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style>.

text.name: Hyper Corrosive Acid
text.currentLevelDescription: Enemies that are damaged by a friendly <style="Faction_Tyranids">Spore Mine</style> take <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style> from attacks by <style="Rarity_Mythic">Mythic</style> <style="Character">characters</style> for {[nrOfRounds]} round.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected enemies now take <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style>.

text.name: Cabal of Sorcerers
text.currentLevelDescription: Friendly <style="Rarity_Mythic">Mythic</style> <style="Psyker">Psyker</style> <style="Character">characters</style> deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style> if they are adjacent to <style="Faction_ThousandSons">Z'Kar</style> or adjacent to another friendly <style="Rarity_Mythic">Mythic</style> <style="Psyker">Psyker</style> <style="Character">character</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected units now deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style>.

text.name: Masters of Manoeuvre
text.currentLevelDescription: Friendly <style="Rarity_Mythic">Mythic</style> <style="Character">characters</style> take <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style> from ranged attacks until the start of their next turn if they have traversed {[tilesTraversed]} or more hexes during their turn or end their turn next to a friendly <style="Rarity_Mythic">Mythic</style> <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Dark Angel</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected units now take <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style> from ranged attacks.

text.name: Squig Launchas
text.currentLevelDescription:
Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Physical">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Physical Damage</style> to an enemy unit that has at least {[nrOfUnits]} friendly <style="Faction_Orks">Ork</style> or {[nrOfUnits_2]} friendly units adjacent to it. Then, if the target has {[nrOfUnits_3]} friendly Orks or {[nrOfUnits_4]} friendly units adjacent to it, summons a <style="Summon"><style="Faction_Orks">Large Squig</style></style> on a random free hex adjacent to the target. 

Large Squig stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

Initial <style="Cooldown">cooldown: {[initialCooldownTurns]} round</style>. 
Cost: <style="Resource_MachinesOfWarAmmo">{[munitionsCost]} munition</style>.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}
text.nextLevelDescription:
Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Physical">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Physical Damage</style>.

Squig stats:

<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Squig Mine
text.nextLevelDescription: Now marks <style="Stat">{[nrOfTiles]}</style> additional random free hexes and enemies take <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style>.

text.name: Vigilance Eternal
text.currentLevelDescription: Targets an enemy unit that has a free adjacent hex within movement range {[range]} of Tyrith or is already on a hex adjacent to Tyrith. She then moves to the free hex and deals {[nrOfHits]}x {[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage to the targeted unit. This ability can be used multiple times per battle but has a cooldown of {[cooldownTurns]} rounds. Using Vigilance Eternal does not end Tyrith's turn.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style>.

text.name: Unwavering Sentinel
text.currentLevelDescription: During each enemy turn, after <style="Faction_Custodes">Tyrith</style> is attacked and the attacker is within range {[range]}, she deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Bolter">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Bolter Damage</style> to the attacker. If there is an enemy adjacent to Tyrith, the range of this ability is reduced to 1.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Bolter">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Bolter Damage</style>.

text.name: Leading the Charge
text.currentLevelDescription:
If <style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Dreir</style> has not moved, he gains <style="Buff_Infiltrate">Infiltrate</style> until the end of this turn and <style="Charging">charges</style> an enemy target that has a free adjacent hex within movement range {[range]}, dealing <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style> to it. Then, summons up to <style="Stat">{[nrOfSummons]}</style> <style="Summon"><style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Death Riders</style></style> in free adjacent hexes that can immediately attack enemies in range. All attacks triggered by this ability have <style="Piercing_Ratio">+{[extraPierceRatio]}% pierce ratio</style> for each friendly unit that has been defeated this battle. 

Death Rider stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>
text.nextLevelDescription:
Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Power">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Power Damage</style>, summons up to <style="Stat">{[nrOfSummons]}</style> <style="Summon"><style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Death Riders</style></style> and attacks have <style="Piercing_Ratio">+{[extraPierceRatio]}% pierce ratio</style>.

Death Rider stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Tough to Kill
text.currentLevelDescription: At the beginning of his turn, <style="Faction_AstraMilitarum">Dreir</style> <style="Regenerate">regenerates</style> <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal]} Health</style>. All attacks against Dreir have <style="Stat">-{[critChanceReduction]}% Crit Chance</style> and deal <style="Stat_CritDamage">-{[critDmgReduction]} Crit Damage</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now <style="Regenerate">regenerates</style> <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal]} Health</style> and attacks against him have <style="Stat">-{[critChanceReduction]}% Crit Chance</style> and deal <style="Stat_CritDamage">-{[critDmgReduction]} Crit Damage</style>.

text.name: Frag Lance
text.currentLevelDescription: When <style="Charging">charging</style>, <style="NormalAttack">normal melee attacks</style> deal an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Blast">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Blast Damage</style>.

text.name: Exemplar of the Mont'ka
text.currentLevelDescription: Until the end of this turn, Commander Farsight and all other friendly Characters with a normal ranged attack gain Unstoppable and all their normal attacks deal +{[extraDmg]} Damage. When attacking a Big Target, they deal +{[extraDmg_2]} Damage instead. Using Exemplar of the Mont'ka does not end Commander Farsight's turn.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected units now deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> or <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg_2]} Damage</style> when attacking <style="Big_Target">Big Targets</style>.

text.name: Way of the Short Blade
text.currentLevelDescription:
<style="NormalAttack">Normal ranged attacks</style> of other friendly <style="Character">Characters</style> within {[range]} hexes against enemies that are adjacent to a friendly <style="Character">Character</style> ignore <style="Stat_Armor">{[armorIgnored]} Armour</style> and deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style>, except attacks that deal <style="DMG_Psychic">Psychic</style> Damage.

<style="Faction_Tau">Commander Farsight</style> and other friendly <style="Faction_Tau">T'au Empire</style> <style="Character">Characters</style> within {[range]} hexes that perform a melee attack immediately perform a <style="NormalAttack">normal ranged attack</style> against the same unit, even if they are adjacent to it.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected attacks now ignore <style="Stat_Armor">{[armorIgnored]} Armour</style> and deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style>.

text.name: Aether Stride
text.currentLevelDescription: Summons Z'Kar as a stationary unit in a 3 hex area on the battlefield. If he is summoned adjacent to a friendly Psyker, he immediately performs a normal attack against a target in range. When Z'Kar is defeated or leaves the battlefield via his Hunter of Souls battlefield ability, he returns as Machine of War. Z'Kar Stats: {[summonHp]} Health {[summonDmg]} Damage {[summonArmor]} Armour Initial cooldown: {[initialCooldownTurns]} round. Cost: {[munitionsCost]} munition.
text.nextLevelDescription:
Z'Kar Stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Infernal Cannon
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style="DMG_Flame">{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} Flame Damage</style>.

text.name: Hunter of Souls
text.currentLevelDescription: At the start of his turn, <style="Faction_ThousandSons">Z'Kar</style> performs a normal attack against a target in range. This attack deals <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> for each adjacent friendly <style="Psyker">Psyker</style>. Afterwards, Z'Kar leaves the battlefield and returns as <style="MoW">Machine of War</style>. If he is defeated while on the battlefield, he also returns as <style="MoW">Machine of War</style>.

text.name: Rites of Morkai
text.currentLevelDescription: Baldr and all surrounding friendly non-mechanical units become Inspired for {[nrOfRounds]} round or until they are revived. The first time each inspired unit would be defeated, it is instead revived with a maximum of {[hp]} Health, unless Overkilled. Inspired units with Final Vengeance deal +{[extraDmg]} Damage with all attacks. After using this ability, Baldr immediately performs a normal melee attack against an adjacent enemy.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected units are now revived with <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style> and deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> if they have <style="FinalJustice">Final Vengeance</style>.

text.name: Healing Balms
text.currentLevelDescription: When <style="Faction_SpaceWolves">Baldr</style> uses his action to <style="Healing">heal</style> a friendly unit, the healed unit has <style="Stat">+{[extraCritChance]}% Crit Chance</style> and deals <style="Stat_CritDamage">+{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage</style> for {[nrOfRounds]} rounds. At the start of its next turn, the affected unit is also healed for <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal]} Health</style>. Baldr can heal friendly units even if they are at full <style="Stat_Health">Health</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected units now have <style="Stat">+{[extraCritChance]}% Crit Chance</style>, deal <style="Stat_CritDamage">+{[extraCritDmg]} Crit Damage</style>, and are healed for <style="Stat_Health">{[hpToHeal]} Health</style>.

text.name: Ancestral Fortune
text.currentLevelDescription: Ûthar gains +{[extraCritChance]}% Crit Chance and +{[extraBlockChance]}% Block chance until the start of his next turn. If he is adjacent to an enemy unit, he immediately performs an attack, dealing {[nrOfHits]}x {[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}. After a combined total of {[nrOfAttacks]} attacks that Ûthar has Blocked or scored Crits in after using Ancestral Fortune, the ability can be used again.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now gains <style="Stat">+{[extraCritChance]}% Crit Chance</style>, <style="Stat">+{[extraBlockChance]}%</style> <style="Stat_Block">Block</style> <style="Stat_Chance">chance</style> and deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style>. The ability can be used again after <style="Stat">{[nrOfAttacks]}</style> eligible attacks.

text.name: Grim Efficiency
text.currentLevelDescription:
Other friendly units within {[range]} hexes of <style="Faction_LeaguesOfVotann">Ûthar</style> gain a bonus based on Ûthar's current effect from <style="PrioritisedEfficiency">Prioritised Efficiency</style>:
Hostile Acquisition: Affected units have <style="Stat_Armor">+{[extraArmor]} Armour</style>.
Fortify Takeover: Affected units have <style="Piercing_Ratio">+{[extraPierceRatio]}% pierce ratio</style> with all attacks.
text.nextLevelDescription:
Hostile Acquisition: Affected units now have <style="Stat_Armor">+{[extraArmor]} Armour</style>.
Fortify Takeover: Affected units now have <style="Piercing_Ratio">+{[extraPierceRatio]}% pierce ratio</style> with all attacks.

text.name: Graviton Rifle
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style> to an enemy in range {[range]} and <style="Debuff_Stunned">Stuns</style> it for {[nrOfRounds]} round. This attack has <style="Piercing_Ratio">+{[extraPierceRatio]}% pierce ratio</style> against <style="Mk_Gravis">MK X Gravis</style>, <style="Terminator_Armor">Terminator Armour</style> or <style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style> units.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style> and has <style="Piercing_Ratio">+{[extraPierceRatio]}% pierce ratio</style>.

text.name: E-COG-Support
text.currentLevelDescription:
Whenever <style="Faction_LeaguesOfVotann">Vynn</style> <style="Repairing">repairs</style> a friendly unit, he summons an <style="Summon"><style="Faction_LeaguesOfVotann">E-COG</style></style> in a free adjacent hex. Cannot have more than {[maxSummons]} E-COGs summoned this way at the same time. 
Vynn can <style="Repairing">repair</style> other friendly units even if they are at full <style="Stat_Health">Health</style> and if he repairs a friendly unit while {[maxSummons]} summoned E-COGs are already on the battlefield, one random summoned E-COG adjacent to Vynn also performs a repair, if possible.

E-COG stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>
text.nextLevelDescription:
E-COG stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Ironkin Steeljack
text.currentLevelDescription:
Summons an <style="Summon"><style="Faction_LeaguesOfVotann">Ironkin Steeljack</style></style> in a free adjacent hex. The Ironkin Steeljack can immediately attack, but cannot move this turn.

Ironkin Steeljack stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>
text.nextLevelDescription:
Ironkin Steeljack stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Predictive Guidance
text.currentLevelDescription: Enemies within 2 hexes of Âmmuk are affected by Predictive Guidance. If an affected enemy did not move in its last turn, other friendly Leagues of Votann or Mechanical units deal +{[extraDmg]} Damage with melee attacks against it. If an affected enemy moved in its last turn, other friendly Leagues of Votann or Mechanical units deal +{[extraDmg_2]} Damage with ranged attacks against it. Other friendly Leagues of Votann units also score an additional hit with all attacks against affected enemies.
text.nextLevelDescription: Friendly units now deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> with melee attacks or <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg_2]} Damage</style> with ranged attacks.

text.name: Purge Response
text.currentLevelDescription: At the end of their turn, if the <style="Faction_LeaguesOfVotann">Ironkin Steeljack</style> is adjacent to a friendly <style="Faction_LeaguesOfVotann">Leagues of Votann</style> <style="Character">character</style>, they start <style="Buff_Overwatching">Overwatching</style>, even if they attacked in their turn. While <style="Buff_Overwatching">Overwatching</style>, the Ironkin Steeljack's attacks ignore hit reductions.

text.name: Augmented Assault
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals {[nrOfHits]}x {[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]} to an adjacent enemy unit and reduces its Armour by {[armorReduction]} Armour for the rest of the battle. Using Augmented Assault does not end Hâvyr's turn.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style> and reduces Armour by <style="Stat_Armor">{[armorReduction]} Armour</style>.

text.name: Fury from the Dêlve
text.currentLevelDescription: <style="Faction_LeaguesOfVotann">Hâvyr's</style> <style="NormalAttack">normal attacks</style> <style="Debuff_Pinned">Suppress</style> enemies that are at more than <style="Stat_Health">{[hpPct]}% Health</style>. After performing a normal attack against enemies that are at or below <style="Stat_Health">{[hpPct]}% Health</style>, Hâvyr performs an additional attack against them, dealing <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style>.
text.nextLevelDescription: The additional attack now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style>.

text.name: Strike from the Shadows
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style> to an enemy within range {[range]}. Until the end of <style="Faction_AdeptusAstartes">Cyrus'</style> next turn, all ranged attacks against the target ignore <style="Stat_Armor">{[armorIgnored]} Armour</style>. After using this ability, Cyrus may move, even if he already moved this turn.
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style> and ignores <style="Stat_Armor">{[armorIgnored]} Armour</style>.

text.name: Haywire Mine
text.currentLevelDescription:
When moving, <style="Faction_AdeptusAstartes">Cyrus</style> places a <style="Steppable">Haywire Mine</style> on the hex he started his move on. Enemies moving onto a Haywire Mine take <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style>. <style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style> enemies take an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle_2]}>{[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} {[DamageProfileType_2]}</style>. If Cyrus does not move, he places a Haywire Mine in a free adjacent hex at the end of his turn.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}
text.nextLevelDescription: Enemies now take <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style> and <style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style> enemies now take an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle_2]}>{[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} {[DamageProfileType_2]}</style>.

text.name: Haywire Mine
text.currentLevelDescription:
Enemies moving onto a <style="Faction_AdeptusAstartes">Haywire Mine</style> take <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style>. <style="Mechanical">Mechanical</style> enemies take an additional <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle_2]}>{[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} {[DamageProfileType_2]}</style>.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}

text.name: Death on the Wind
text.currentLevelDescription:
Targets an enemy unit that was already attacked this turn. Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style> to all enemies on a straight line {[nrOfTiles]} hexes long, starting on the hex of the targeted enemy. Affected enemies take <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style> from the next attack by a friendly <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Dark Angel</style> this turn.

Initial <style="Cooldown">cooldown: {[initialCooldownTurns]} round</style>. 
Cost: <style="Resource_MachinesOfWarAmmo">{[munitionsCost]} munition</style>.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}
text.nextLevelDescription: Now deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style> and enemies take <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage</style>.

text.name: Hailstrike
text.currentLevelDescription:
Targets a friendly unit on the battlefield. For {[nrOfRounds]} round, it has <style="Piercing_Ratio">+{[extraPierceRatio]}% pierce ratio</style> with ranged attacks and attacks while <style="Buff_Overwatching">Overwatching</style>. When the affected unit targets an enemy with one of these attacks, the <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Storm Speeder</style> attacks the same target, dealing <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style>.

{[S/AbilityDamageExplanation]}
text.nextLevelDescription: Affected attacks now have <style="Piercing_Ratio">+{[extraPierceRatio]}% pierce ratio</style> and the <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Storm Speeder</style> deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style>.

text.name: Instruments of Vengeance
text.currentLevelDescription:
<style="Faction_DarkAngels">Lion El'Jonson</style> marks hexes in two straight lines, originating from the edges of the battlefield. At the end of this turn, if there is no enemy unit adjacent to Lion El'Jonson, he starts <style="Buff_Overwatching">Overwatching</style>. At the beginning of his next turn, all enemies on marked hexes take <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style>. Lion El'Jonson then summons <style="STAT">{[nrOfSummons]}</style> <style="Summon"><style="Faction_DarkAngels">Deathwing Knights</style></style> in free hexes on the battlefield. They can immediately attack enemies in range, but cannot move this turn.

Deathwing Knight stats:
<style="Stat_Health">{[summonHp]} Health</style>
<style="Stat_Damage">{[summonDmg]} Damage</style>
<style="Stat_Armor">{[summonArmor]} Armour</style>

text.name: Martial Exemplar
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style> to all adjacent enemies. Then moves up to {[nrOfTiles]} hex towards the closest enemy unit and performs a <style="NormalAttack">normal attack</style>. These attacks and all further attacks this turn have <style="Stat">+{[extraCritChance]}% Crit Chance</style> against <style="Summon">Summons</style>.

text.name: The Lion's Wrath
text.currentLevelDescription: Deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style> to an adjacent enemy unit and <style="Debuff_Taunted">Taunts</style> it for {[nrOfRounds]} round. At the beginning of his next turn, if the targeted unit is still adjacent to <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Lion El'Jonson</style>, he deals  <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits_2]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle_2]}>{[minDmg_2]}-{[maxDmg_2]} {[DamageProfileType_2]}</style> to it. All attacks triggered by this ability have a <style="Stat">{[chance]}% Chance</style> to score a <style="Stat_CritDamage">Crit</style> with their second <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style>, even if the first <style="Stat_Hits">hit</style> did not score a <style="Stat_CritDamage">Crit</style>.

text.name: Primarch of the First Legion
text.currentLevelDescription: Half of the <style="Stat_Hits">hits</style> (rounded down) scored against <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Lion El'Jonson</style> are scored against other friendly adjacent <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Dark Angels</style> instead. Friendly Dark Angels that take <style="Stat_Damage">Damage</style> this way deal <style="Stat_Damage">+{[extraDmg]} Damage</style> for {[nrOfRounds]} round.

text.name: Fealty
text.currentLevelDescription: When <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Lion El'Jonson</style> performs a <style="NormalAttack">normal melee attack</style>, he also deals <style="Stat_Hits">{[nrOfHits]}x</style> <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style> to all enemies adjacent to both the target of the attack and to Lion El'Jonson.

text.name: The Emperor's Shield
text.currentLevelDescription: Each hit scored by a <style="Stat_Melee">melee attack</style> against <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Lion El'Jonson</style> increases his <style="Stat_Block">Block</style> <style="Stat_Chance">chance</style> by <style="Stat">+{[blockChance]}%</style> until the end of this turn. Every time Lion El'Jonson blocks <style="Stat">{[nrOfAttacks]}</style> or more <style="Stat_Hits">hits</style> of a <style="Stat_Melee">melee attack</style> against him, he deals <style={[DamageProfileTypeStyle]}>{[minDmg]}-{[maxDmg]} {[DamageProfileType]}</style> to the attacker.

text.name: No Hiding from the Watchers
text.currentLevelDescription: Any <style="Stat_Damage">Damage</style> this unit takes is reduced to 0. After being attacked, this unit moves {[nrOfTiles]} hex, trying to move away from all other units. If there is no other friendly <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Dark Angel</style> on the battlefield except other <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Watchers in the Dark</style>, then this unit leaves the battlefield.

text.name: Watched Over
text.currentLevelDescription: Adjacent friendly units take <style="DMG_Psychic">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Psychic Damage</style> from enemy attacks and if they have a <style="Stat_Block">Block</style> <style="Stat_Chance">chance</style>, that Block Chance is increased by <style="Stat">+{[blockChance]}%</style>. Enemy <style="Psyker">Psykers</style> will not hit an additional unit with their <style="NormalAttack">normal ranged attacks</style> when attacking units that are adjacent to a <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Watcher in the Dark</style>.

text.name: Redemption of the Risen
text.currentLevelDescription: Each time a friendly <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Dark Angel</style> is defeated by a <style="Aliance_Chaos">Chaos</style> enemy, <style="Faction_DarkAngels">Forcas</style> loses <style="Stat_Health">{[hp]} Health</style>. If a friendly Dark Angel is defeated during the enemy turn, Forcas and all friendly Dark Angels start <style="Buff_Overwatching">Overwatching</style>. As long as there is another friendly Dark Angel on the battlefield, Forcas and friendly adjacent Dark Angels take <style="Stat_Damage">-{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage</style>.

text.name: Hunt the Fallen
text.currentLevelDescription: At the start of the battle, a random enemy Chaos unit is identified as Fallen. If there is no Chaos unit, a random enemy unit is designated as Deathwing Quarry. All friendly Dark Angels deal +{[extraDmgPct]}% Damage to Fallen. Each time Baraqiel is attacked by a Fallen, he loses {[hp_2]} Health in addition to the damage done, or {[hp]} Health if attacked by Deathwing Quarry. Baraqiel takes -{[dmgReductionPct]}% Damage from all other attacks.
